"But how can I deepen this relationship in a natural way without feeling awkward?" Secretary Cheng, being a shrewd individual, was already frantically calculating in his mind.

Just then, speak of the devil.

Secretary Cheng's phone started vibrating. Luckily, it had been silenced before the meeting, otherwise, the ringtone might have been deafening. Taking out his phone, Secretary Cheng was initially prepared to hang up immediately.

But seeing the contact name "Brother Jiang Tian," Secretary Cheng was overjoyed. Glancing around, he saw Jiang Tian lurking in a corner. Secretary Cheng had no interest in listening to what was said in the meeting.

In Secretary Cheng's mind, Jiang Tian was now the boss.

Whether others could see through it or not, Secretary Cheng could absolutely see what this action meant.

So, has there ever been a case in history where an anti-drug officer was thrust into the public eye and exposed?

Absolutely not.

Don't just talk about his great achievements. There have been two or three geniuses who received first-class merit awards before, but those were all kept strictly confidential and protected.

Now, exposing Jiang Tian is a move to plan for the future, even for a future leadership position.

Adding to Jiang Tian's own achievements, once exposed...

Hiss!!!

Secretary Cheng simply couldn't imagine the terrifying explosion that someone like Jiang Tian would cause nationwide.

So many achievements, and most importantly, such terrifying results.

Once exposed, the whole country would be in an uproar. First-class merit aside, even the historic, only special-class merit award in peacetime would be enough to cause a national uproar.

"Not only that, but not long ago, I wonder if everyone has learned about the dark web."

Song Liguo continued calmly.

Giving the national teams some time to process the situation and accept reality, Song Liguo then dropped the next bombshell.

Compared to 140 tons, it's utterly insignificant compared to the power of the dark web.

The meeting continued.

At 8:00 AM, Li Xianying's plane finally landed at Yunhai Airport from Beijing. Without the slightest delay, Li Xianying went straight to the Municipal Public Security Bureau. Before coming, he had already learned from his daughter, Li Qingqing, that her daughter was still at the bureau.

Therefore, Li Xianying traveled at breakneck speed, seemingly afraid that arriving even a moment later might cause problems for Li Qingqing.

Of course, Li Xianying didn't harbor any ill will towards Jiang Tian. After all, Jiang Tian had saved Qingqing, and he understood this. Therefore, Li Xianying wasn't targeting Jiang Tian, ​​nor was he being condescending or overly sensitive, worrying about nothing.

Mainly, Li Xianying knew the potential for a "hero saves the damsel in distress" scenario, and he wanted to nip any potential problems in the bud.

It was just a casual act, but who knew this unexpected turn of events would occur?

Jiang Tian and Minister Tan's confrontational attitude only made Li Xianying more worried.

As Li Xianying rushed over, Secretary Cheng had already quietly slipped out of the huge conference room from the back and hurriedly answered Jiang Tian's call.

"Young Master Jiang, what's up? I'm in a meeting with Secretary Mu at the Municipal Bureau. Is there anything I can help you with?" Secretary Cheng's tone was as soft as could be.

This made Jiang Tian feel as if he were meeting Secretary Cheng for the first time. Although somewhat surprised, Jiang Tian didn't press the matter further.

"Nothing much."

"Just a small, personal matter. I'd like to ask Secretary Cheng for your help." Jiang Tian said with a smile.

The next moment, Secretary Cheng's voice suddenly snapped: "What are you saying, Young Master Jiang? Are you looking down on me? You actually asked me for help? What do you mean? You don't consider me a friend, you treat me like an outsider?"

"Just say what you need, or I'll just get angry and throw a tantrum!"



Chapter 540 Gathering in the Sea of ​​Clouds, Storms Rise


Jiang Tian was slightly surprised.

However, he didn't think much of it. After all, Secretary Cheng had been rescued because of him; in a way, he could be considered a savior.

Besides, Secretary Cheng had invited Jiang Tian to dinner more than once, but unfortunately, Jiang Tian hadn't had the time until now.

Jiang Tian understood the saying, "Even a seventh-rank official is subject to the prime minister's gate." Secretary Cheng's influence in the entire Yunnan province was considerable, at least for now. There were things Secretary Mu couldn't do, but Secretary Cheng could easily accomplish.

And what Secretary Mu needed to do, he needed Secretary Cheng to convey.

In the secretary's position, if the leader is powerful, then one can truly do whatever one wants.

And the power of the third-ranking person was self-evident.

What clearly surprised Jiang Tian was that, previously, Secretary Cheng had been relatively friendly to him, out of respect for Secretary Mu and his own abilities. While she wanted to befriend him, it hadn't been this outrageous.

Unable to understand, Jiang Tian didn't dwell on it. Changing the subject, he brought up Fang Jie's situation.

There's a saying:

I can help you.

I'll help you because you're my friend, because I want to help you.

Not because you're asking me for favors or asking me for help.

"Fang Jie, it seems you're not a fool after all!"

Jiang Tian smiled to himself after saying this.

It has to be said, Fang Jie is indeed a clever man. Jiang Tian clearly saw through his use of a blind date as an excuse to smoothly reveal Lili's affair with the rich second-generation.

Whether he helps or not is Jiang Tian's business, and how he does it is also Jiang Tian's business. He's just here to ask Fang Jie about blind dates.

Whether Jiang Tian helps or not won't affect their relationship.

"It seems Fang Jie has indeed matured a lot after this setback," Jiang Tian thought to himself.

"Brother, what's going on? Hahaha, a rich kid, do you even have a name?" Secretary Cheng couldn't help but laugh out loud after hearing the story, but quickly suppressed it.

Mainly because the story was too convoluted. Even Secretary Cheng, with his vast experience, was secretly shocked; such a convoluted and bizarre thing could exist in the world.

So the question is, did the rich kid cheat on Fang Jie, or did Fang Jie cheat on the rich kid?

That is the question.

"I'm not quite sure either, Secretary Cheng. If you have time, please investigate and teach him a lesson. If not, then forget it," Jiang Tian said carefully.

He didn't want to trouble Secretary Cheng, so he left it at that.

Secretary Cheng understood: "What are you saying? Your business is my business. Wait, I'll get back to you right away."

For Secretary Cheng's resources, investigating a rich kid was more than enough.

"But after you finish your business, you can't stand me up tonight, right? Let's have dinner together," Secretary Cheng inquired.

Jiang Tian's eyelids twitched, and he quickly explained Fang Jie's appointment for that evening.

Secretary Cheng, thinking something serious was going on, quickly said, "Oh, is that so? That's easy. I'll go with you and give you my opinion. While I may not be as good as you at handling cases, I'm quite confident in my understanding of human nature."

What could Jiang Tian say? He could only nod in agreement.

However, just as Jiang Tian hung up the phone, wanting to go back to sleep, the phone rang blaring again.

Jiang Tian's face darkened. He took out his phone and glanced at it—an unknown number?

Without thinking, Jiang Tian hung up immediately, but less than three seconds later, the phone started ringing again, which annoyed him.

He finally had a day off, and it really didn't give him any time to rest.

He hadn't noticed how busy the Municipal Bureau was; neither his subordinates nor his superiors had called him.

Jiang Tian, ​​his face dark, answered the phone, his mood not good.

"I'll give you one minute to explain. If you can't satisfy me, I'll make you regret it for the rest of your life." Jiang Tian's expression was blank, his voice unwavering.

There was complete silence on the other end of the line.

However, after what seemed like an eternity...

Just as Jiang Tian was starting to get impatient, a faint voice came from the phone: "This is Li Xianying. I'm waiting for you downstairs."

The call ended abruptly.

Jiang Tian was stunned. He glanced at the time; it was just 8:30.

Li Xianying?

She's in Yunhai?

Is she crazy?

Jiang Tian's anger flared.

Even if she's his boss, she can't be this unreasonable.

After all, this was the first time he'd encountered something like this. The most outrageous thing was that Jiang Tian had never intended anything in return for saving Li Qingqing.

What he couldn't stand was the threat he was being threatened.

What he couldn't stand the most was that he was practically Li Qingqing's savior, yet Li Xianying treated him like a thief.

If he really had some ulterior motive, that would be one thing.

But…

Jiang Tian was very unhappy.

Just as Jiang Tian was about to stand up and leave, his phone rang.

Jiang Tian didn't even feel like complaining. In fact, as he'd gotten to where he was now, with more and more people and connections, this wasn't the first time something like this had happened.

When on missions, he usually turned his phone off for peace and quiet.

But the person calling now surprised Jiang Tian slightly.

Qin Shiyu?

Jiang Tian's brow twitched.

Since their last meeting, Qin Shiyu had gone to Donghai, and the two hadn't been in contact for a long time.

Now Qin Shiyu was back?

Jiang Tian was slightly surprised.

"Hey bro, I'm waiting for you at the entrance of your apartment complex. Do you have time to grab something to eat and chat?" Qin Shiyu's distinctive voice rang out.

"Why are you back?" Jiang Tian asked, slightly surprised.

"Of course, I couldn't wait for you in Donghai, so I came back to Yunhai to find you," Qin Shiyu said softly.

Jiang Tian got goosebumps all over: "Get to the point."

"My investment in Yunhai has run into trouble. I came to you to find out what's going on. The construction site was attacked and people are trying to extort money from me. You're not going to just ignore this, are you?"



Chapter 541 Who would want to know someone like this? Wait, who are you?


"Yunhai Investment is in trouble?"

Jiang Tian's expression turned slightly serious. He narrowed his eyes, carefully considering the meaning behind Qin Shiyu's words and her attitude.

This time, Qin Shiyu's attitude was completely different, entirely different from before, which surprised Jiang Tian.

Before this, although Qin Shiyu and Jiang Tian were quite familiar with each other before leaving Yunhai, they weren't particularly close. At most, Jiang Tian could only be considered to have saved Qin Shiyu.

But Jiang Tian also sensed that Qin Shiyu's identity was not simple.

Mainly because of that occasion—coming from Beijing to Yunhai at great expense and with great difficulty from Mu Feng to bring her along to invest in Yunhai.

Furthermore, Jiang Tian had gleaned from fragments of information from later generations that Qin Shiyu was not as simple as she appeared on the surface. In fact, Qin Shiyu was involved in a mysterious background, and a core mysterious background within Beijing.

Why was Jiang Tian so certain? Because in her later life, Qin Shiyu had become an idol for countless women, her fame even reaching across the Atlantic.

The key was Qin Shiyu's successful investments. Even more terrifyingly, in her later life, Qin Shiyu had even entered the global rich list—note, not the women's list.

Even if it were a women's list, she wouldn't have such terrifying fame and influence. The main reason was that she entered the overall rich list, and even her ranking wasn't particularly low.

Because of this, Qin Shiyu caused a sensation in her later life. Later, when the people across the Atlantic investigated her background, they discovered that Qin Shiyu's background was terrifying and not simple.

Although this news ultimately didn't cause a major upheaval within the country for various reasons and was quickly suppressed, some of it still circulated, and Jiang Tian had seen it.

Of course, Jiang Tian didn't know how much of it was true.

It's obvious that someone of such exceptional quality could never be cultivated in an ordinary family. Qin Shiyu's aura is genuine; it's a quality even wealthy families struggle to cultivate. Jiang Tian is certain of this.

Therefore, the rumors from his previous life are highly credible.

So, is it normal for Qin Shiyu's investment in Yunhai to run into problems at this time?

Obviously, something is wrong. Even if problems have arisen,

Given Qin Shiyu's status and position, would she need to come to him?

And even if she did, why this tone of utter condescension? Is Qin Shiyu ill, or has she developed a mental illness?

This was Jiang Tian's first thought.

"That's right. Let me explain in detail. In short, things are very complicated. That Mu Feng seems difficult to handle. In short, it's too complex. Even if I were personally involved, I wouldn't be able to unravel it all. So, compared to others, I'm more willing to trust you." Qin Shiyu made no attempt to hide the contempt in her tone.

Perhaps it's true that Qin Shiyu was born to be high and mighty, which is actually normal.

What happened just now was abnormal.

"Then should I be honored?" Jiang Tian's lips twitched.

“The main problem is that I don’t trust anyone else. In the entire Yunhai, I don’t even dare trust Mu Feng or Secretary Mu. But you are the only one I’m most willing to trust and most willing to trust,” Qin Shiyu said simply.

Jiang Tian felt a slight pang of sadness. He understood; Yunhai had always been in this situation. Although Jiang Tian had resolved many issues, the problem remained the same.

Arresting ordinary drug dealers had already utilized almost all police resources, even drawing in many from other areas.

The numerous addicts below had completely exploded.

These addicts, whose numbers were terrifying and far exceeded nationwide, naturally exploded without a source, becoming a destabilizing force in society.

The key issue was that there wasn’t enough time to arrest them one by one.

Especially since the compulsory drug rehabilitation centers were already full.

This caused significant social instability.

The key issue is that while Yunhai seems to have solved so many major cases, the deep-sea crocodile remains hidden in the depths. Whether there are other motives behind this, Jiang Tian doesn't know.

However, Qin Shiyu didn't seek Mu Feng's help; instead, she came directly to him.

Whether she truly trusts him, Jiang Tian isn't entirely sure, but he senses that Qin Shiyu likely has deeper motives.

So, the question arises.

Should he go see Qin Shiyu or Li Xianying?

Jiang Tian walked to the apartment building entrance, lost in thought. But then, he glanced over.

Wow.

A Rolls-Royce. Undoubtedly, this is Qin Shiyu's car—extremely luxurious and sophisticated, anything but understated, perfectly matching her personality.

Qin Shiyu is the kind of woman who is very flamboyant and extremely confident.

Although they haven't known each other for long, Jiang Tian understands Qin Shiyu extremely well.

This is psychology.

On the other hand...

It was an ordinary official car, currently parked in front of Jiang Tian, ​​less than ten meters away.

Now, there was no need to consider anything else. Compared to Li Xianying, whom he utterly loathed, Qin Shiyu was far more important to Jiang Tian.

So Jiang Tian simply ignored the official car; Li Xianying was currently inside it.

"At such a young age, he's achieved so much. While he has the right to be arrogant, he's become a bit too inflated. This isn't a good thing."

Inside the official car, Li Xianying, who had been waiting for a long time, checked the time, his mood worsening.

Li Xianying was usually very composed, but facing Jiang Tian, ​​he couldn't suppress the boiling anger within him.

Over the years, everyone had treated him with utmost respect.

Even his superiors wouldn't dare treat him like this.

Now, he actually felt a deep sense of contempt and disdain emanating from Jiang Tian.

He was being looked down upon?

Li Xianying remained convinced that she was overthinking things.

"Boss, Jiang Tian is here."

Just then, the driver suddenly spoke up.

"He's down? At least this kid still has some sense. I really thought he'd gotten so arrogant. Young people this arrogant never end well." Li Xianying shook his head with a wry smile.

It's the same old story: there are so many geniuses in the world.

But how many actually rise to the top?

Very few. That's because ninety percent fall on the path to success, and those geniuses were never truly geniuses.

Although Jiang Tian's past achievements, at least in Li Xianying's memory, made him undeniably number one.

However, Li Xianying always believed that arrogant and conceited young people, especially in this position, never end well.

"Sure enough, stopping Qingqing and Jiang Tian was the right thing to do. Even as friends, someone like that won't have a good ending." Li Xianying was even more convinced of this now.

Such a person...

"Heh, who would want to associate with someone powerful and influential like this? They haven't even developed anything yet, and they're already inflated egos. Their future is already clearly visible. Getting to know them will only bring danger, nothing more." Li Xianying shook her head.

In reality, her words, though crude, were quite true. If Jiang Tian heard this, he would wholeheartedly agree.

For anyone else, it might truly be as Li Xianying thought: nothing but trouble.

"You're here," Li Xianying straightened her raincoat.

She slammed open the car door, wanting to meet Jiang Tian.

But unfortunately.

When Li Xianying stood beside the car, a slight smile on her face.

She greeted Jiang Tian.

Li Xianying felt she had already given him a lot of face.

But what Li Xianying never expected was this:

Jiang Tian, ​​right in front of her, actually walked right past her without even glancing at her.

Huh?

Did she mistake him for someone else?



Chapter 542 Lee Hyun-young's explosion, it was actually her?


Li Xianying's impression of Jiang Tian was fairly good.

Actually, it still came down to this: while he respected Jiang Tian, ​​he wasn't optimistic about his future.

Moreover, in Li Xianying's view, Jiang Tian's current success was temporary. Even if he was favored by higher-ups, it was all based on Jiang Tian's past relentless crackdown on criminal groups.

Undoubtedly, in the treacherous Yunhai, Jiang Tian's actions put not only himself but also his family in constant danger.

Regardless of his own stance, Li Xianying admired Jiang Tian's actions.

However, Li Xianying didn't want himself or Li Qingqing to have any involvement with Jiang Tian.

He had only severed ties between Jiang Tian and Li Qingqing.

Jiang Tian's indifference even gave Li Xianying the illusion that he had mistaken Jiang Tian for someone else; he had already come down, and Jiang Tian had simply passed him by.

If he hadn't mistaken someone for someone else, Li Xianying couldn't understand why Jiang Tian would do this, let alone give her such a disrespectful look.

"Did I mistake him for someone else?" Li Xianying turned around, bewildered.

His gaze fell on his secretary.

The secretary, her brows furrowed, shook her head. "It's Jiang Tian, ​​there's no mistake."

"Or, he doesn't recognize me?" Li Xianying continued to speculate.

"Perhaps, maybe, but it shouldn't be like this. You called beforehand. With Jiang Tian's meticulous thinking when solving cases in the past, he wouldn't have failed to recognize you when you got out of the car," the secretary analyzed.

"So, Jiang Tian did it on purpose." Li Xianying's face instantly darkened.

However, Li Xianying's expression quickly returned to normal. At his level, his control over his emotions had reached a terrifying level; his emotions weren't simply displayed on his face.

But, Li Xianying's gaze towards Jiang Tian carried a cold glint.

Repeatedly showing him no respect, even someone with a strong temper will eventually give way.

Especially now.

This blatant disrespect has completely changed Li Xianying's attitude towards Jiang Tian.

"Humility can lead to progress, but similarly, pride after progress can easily destroy a person. A few achievements and he becomes arrogant? Heh, he's still young, inexperienced, and impulsive. I initially thought Jiang Tian's actions would set him apart from others, but now it seems I overestimated him." Li Xianying shook her head, no longer wanting to look.

She had originally intended to talk to Jiang Tian after their meeting, but now, Li Xianying had lost interest.

Putting everything else aside, based on today's events alone, Li Xianying had lost interest in Jiang Tian's future, even concluding that someone with such a personality wouldn't go far in life.

“Let’s go. He’s done something worthwhile, yet he acts so impulsively. He doesn’t deserve my humble attitude. But after all, he saved Qingqing, so I won’t do anything to him. Forget it, let’s leave it at that.” Li Xianying turned to get into the car.

But as she turned back, a glimpse caught her eye.

And she suddenly saw something utterly astonishing.

She saw Jiang Tian, ​​who had just passed her, standing less than ten meters behind her.

The Rolls-Royce, its lights gleaming.

Of course, it was just a Rolls-Royce. In 2003, while rare and extremely prestigious, it wasn't anything special for someone of Li Xianying's level.

The main issue was Jiang Tian's connection to the owner of such a car.

This greatly surprised Li Xianying.

Given Jiang Tian's status and position, normally, as an anti-drug officer, he shouldn't have any connection with the owner of such a car.

An anti-drug officer, a wealthy man.

Or had he already become so blatantly corrupt?

"Young man, is he simply unable to resist temptation?"

Li Xianying thought sharply, increasingly sensing something was wrong with Yunhai.

He was about to turn and leave.

The next moment.

Suddenly, he saw a woman in a purple dress step out of the driver's seat. She was extremely tall, and even the skin on her slender arms appeared snow-white.

Just her profile was breathtakingly beautiful.

But that wasn't the key point.

The crucial issue was that, the next moment, the stunningly beautiful woman was already intimately embracing Jiang Tian.

Hiss!!!

Li Xianying's eyes widened.

No, I mean...

Li Xianying's heart skipped a beat, and he raised an eyebrow: "A woman from the business world?"

Considering Jiang Tian's identity, if he had a girlfriend like this, it meant that perhaps he had misunderstood things with Li Qingqing.

No, it wasn't exactly a misunderstanding, after all, he knew the power of a hero rescuing a damsel in distress, but seeing this scene, Li Xianying had to admit he felt slightly relieved.

"So you already have a girlfriend. But, boss, you did a good job before. After all, she's just a woman from the business world. If Jiang Tian knew Qingqing's true identity, who knows what he might do?" the secretary said from the side.

Li Xianying nodded slightly in agreement, saying, "You're right. After all, men are all like that, hehe..."

Human nature is like that.

Perhaps Jiang Tian initially had no interest in having a girlfriend, but what if he found out Li Qingqing's identity? Using her status as his savior and his daughter, wouldn't it be incredibly easy for him to take advantage of her?

One thing at a time. Although Jiang Tian saved Qingqing, Li Xianying couldn't allow such a possibility to occur. It was always better to be cautious.

Thinking this, Li Xianying was about to look away.

But the next moment…

After their intimate embrace, their shadows separated, but the woman casually turned around and saw Li Xianying.

She seemed somewhat surprised to see Li Xianying.

But the moment Li Xianying saw this woman, his mind went blank.

What an exquisite face! What a perfect, tall figure! And that arrogant, disdainful yet awe-inspiring aura!

But all of that wasn't the most important thing.

The most crucial thing was that this woman…

"Pfft!!!"

"Holy crap."



Chapter 543 Admits to the inexplicable relationship with Qin Shiyu


"Qin Shiyu?"

Li Xianying's eyes widened in disbelief as she stared at the woman intimately embracing Jiang Tian. Her face, for a moment, turned ashen, as if she'd seen a ghost.

"Boss."

The secretary, witnessing her boss's drastic reaction, was utterly startled.

Qin Shiyu?

To be honest...

While a secretary is undoubtedly a confidante of their boss, they are not authorized to access the boss's private affairs.

Especially for someone like Li Xianying, whose status and family background are formidable, an ordinary secretary like him simply has no right to know.

As for matters concerning family circles, that's even more beyond the reach of a secretary like him.

And now, with Li Xianying's utterly shocked expression, it was clear that the name Li Xianying had uttered was no ordinary person. Was it that woman?

A secretary, first and foremost, needs a meticulous personality.

In a short time, the secretary had already pieced together many details in his mind.

Sure enough.

Li Xianying gasped sharply.

His expression shifted rapidly.

In truth, Li Xianying's trip to see Jiang Tian wasn't really about causing trouble. He simply wanted to calmly clarify some misunderstandings between them.

He harbored no ill intentions.

His personal trip to Yunhai stemmed from a realization that he might have been somewhat arrogant in his previous actions. Although he didn't take Jiang Tian seriously, Minister Tan's blunt attitude instantly brought Li Xianying back to his senses.

He understood that he had overstepped his bounds.

He had gone too far.

So, this trip was to meet with Jiang Tian in person, partly to clear up the misunderstanding, but essentially, he still harbored an arrogant attitude and never considered Jiang Tian to be on his level.

But now, Li Xianying's expression changed repeatedly, and his thoughts were completely in disarray.

Just as Jiang Tian had guessed, Qin Shiyu's identity wasn't just not simple; it was far beyond simple.

Most importantly...

Looking at their interactions, Li Xianying realized this was clearly not an ordinary friendship. He had heard of Qin Shiyu, this third-generation descendant, and even witnessed her firsthand.

He had never heard of her being involved with any man.

In other words, she had never interacted much with men before, yet now she was so intimate with Jiang Tian; an ordinary relationship was absolutely impossible.

The most likely explanation was that Qin Shiyu and Jiang Tian had a special relationship.

A relationship beyond friendship.

"Are you crazy?" Li Xianying's mind was in complete turmoil. He looked down on Jiang Tian's identity, profession, actions, and future prospects; how could he possibly approve of Qin Shiyu's family?

How could that be?

Unbeknownst to Li Xianying, Jiang Tian was also somewhat bewildered at this moment.

He and Qin Shiyu had indeed had a good relationship; in fact, when Qin Shiyu left, she even went out of her way to help him out of a predicament caused by Mu Ya's mother.

She even went so far as to back Jiang Tian up.

Although Jiang Tian saved Qin Shiyu, Qin Shiyu's response and actions were almost perfectly balanced, making Jiang Tian feel extremely comfortable and at ease with her. What's even more unimaginable is that...

Beneath Qin Shiyu's seemingly aloof exterior, after becoming particularly familiar with Jiang Tian, ​​she even revealed a side completely different from her outward appearance.

“Surprised? Appearances are just a facade. At my level, hypocrisy is ingrained in my bones. Isn’t that ridiculous? After all, it’s quite sad that a single attitude could cause a misunderstanding.” Qin Shiyu whispered close to Jiang Tian.

It was as if a foxtail grass had been placed beside Jiang Tian’s ear, gently tickling him.

This gave Jiang Tian goosebumps all over his body.

However, Jiang Tian couldn't agree with Qin Shiyu's words. If this was considered tragic, what was he in his past life?

Was he worse off than a pig or a dog?

Thinking about it carefully, Jiang Tian realized that he really was worse off than a pig or a dog in his past life.

His life was far more than just miserable.

“However, you seem to be in a little trouble now.” Qin Shiyu tilted her head, glancing slightly at Li Xianying.

“It is a little troublesome, but not really troublesome,” Jiang Tian sighed.

“I already know,” Qin Shiyu said with a smile.

“Uh, you know?” Jiang Tian was astonished.

Qin Shiyu already knew about him and Li Xianying? Impossible! Not only was it a short time, but also, very few people knew.

How did Qin Shiyu know?

“Never mind how I know. It's just that Li Xianying came to Yunhai, and I came directly from Donghai. By the way, I asked you to help me deal with this trouble. How about this as payment for helping you solve your problem?” Qin Shiyu said softly.

Hiss!!

Jiang Tian felt a tingling sensation all over his body.

There's something I have to mention.

After being reborn, Jiang Tian is now incredibly strong, especially in his non-human state—his physique is absolutely terrifying. He used to spend most of his time on missions, but now, unexpectedly, all his energy is focused on solving cases.

This is the first time Jiang Tian has encountered a situation like this, aside from Gao Yangyang.

The key point is...

Gao Yangyang and Qin Shiyu are completely different types. Gao Yangyang is like the girl next door.

She evokes a sense of pure nostalgia.

But Qin Shiyu...

"You know him?" Jiang Tian casually shifted his attention.

Even Qin Shiyu's brow twitched at his natural demeanor; she was shocked by Jiang Tian's composure.

He can remain completely unfazed?

But her heart was racing!

If she couldn't sense it, Qin Shiyu would almost have been fooled by Jiang Tian's calm exterior.

"We've met a few times," Qin Shiyu nodded slightly.

Sure enough.

Jiang Tian realized that Qin Shiyu had come to his rescue after learning about Li Xianying's situation.

She received the news and immediately flew from Donghai.

At this time, Qin Shiyu had likely set off the moment Li Xianying departed.

Then, something truly chilling happened.

Why was Qin Shiyu able to grasp Li Xianying's actions so quickly?

Jiang Tian was slightly surprised, increasingly realizing that Qin Shiyu's identity was probably not as simple as it seemed.

"Uncle Li, long time no see. I just didn't expect to meet you here again. I heard you said my boyfriend has feelings for Qingqing, and that you not only called and used both threats and persuasion, but also personally came to break them up, afraid my boyfriend would fall for Qingqing!" Qin Shiyu's words were laced with barbs.

The key point is that Jiang Tian was completely shocked.

He thought he knew the general idea, but this was more than just a general idea; it was like she had experienced it firsthand.

She knew so much detail.

Just one sentence.

Bottled with barbs.

Li Xianying was furious.

Afraid Jiang Tian would fall for her?

He had worried before, but now, looking at Qin Shiyu in front of him, these words made Li Xianying blush!

Of course, Li Xianying's head exploded and his eyes widened. The most terrifying thing was that Qin Shiyu admitted it?



Chapter 544 Helping Qin Shiyu Achieve New Glory and Dominate the World


Especially when she had guessed it, witnessing it firsthand, and especially hearing Qin Shiyu's words, Li Xianying's expression still trembled.

"Qin Shiyu, you girl, are you crazy?!"

Li Xianying said, her face visibly shaken.

Indeed.

In Li Xianying's eyes, Qin Shiyu was simply insane. This Jiang Tian was definitely not as good as he appeared on the surface.

Comparatively, let alone Qin Shiyu, even for someone of Li Xianying's status, the best choice would be to find someone of equal social standing.

Then, they could combine their resources and seek mutual progress.

But Jiang Tian, ​​this nouveau riche—yes, a nouveau riche without any real foundation—had no guarantee of a future, very poor risk tolerance, and was practically a huge gamble.

On the other hand, Jiang Tian's position wasn't a stable job within the system.

This kind of job was constantly exposed to the elements, and the most likely outcome was that he might invest a lot of political resources, only to die in battle before any returns were seen.

Furthermore, it must be acknowledged that social stability is somewhat unstable, and Yunhai is far ahead of the curve in this regard.

It's no longer just social unrest; this is a criminal gang operating unchecked.

Didn't you see?

If the armed police were attacked anywhere in the mainland, the whole country would be in an uproar. But now, if such a case were to occur again in Yunhai, everyone would probably be getting used to it.

Qin Shiyu's previously polite, aloof smile vanished, her expression turning increasingly cold: "I respect you as an elder and call you Uncle Li, but that's all I respect. It's none of your business to interfere in the affairs of the Qin family."

"Also, don't judge our Qin family with your old-fashioned ideas. You're just old-fashioned feudalism. You think I'm confused? Then I'd like to ask you, has Jiang Tian committed any wrongdoing?"

Li Xianying's face darkened. Wrongdoing?

How could that be?

"So he hasn't done anything wrong. Then I'll continue with my question: Is Jiang Tian a coward, someone who deserves to be looked down upon?" Qin Shiyu pressed aggressively.

"No." Even though Li Xianying had reservations about Jiang Tian, ​​she had to admit that in this respect, if Jiang Tian, ​​a prodigy who could single-handedly hold off hundreds of people, besiege thousands, and escape over a hundred kilometers with his burdens, was a coward, then no one else could possibly survive.

Qin Shiyu continued to press, "Then are you saying that Jiang Tian lacks ambition and has no future?"

Li Xianying's eyelids twitched violently.

She was completely stunned by those words.

Lacking ambition?

Isn't that utter nonsense?

Good heavens, a rough investigation would reveal just how many merits Jiang Tian has accumulated; he's a monster.

Normally, a second-class merit award means a promising future.

He's already a key candidate for promotion. Just one second-class merit award would put him ahead of 99% of his colleagues. Even without connections, he'd be a shoo-in for promotion under normal circumstances.

A first-class merit award is even more outrageous. Anyone who gets one undoubtedly has a bright future.

Besides, this guy seems to have even received a special-class merit award.

At this point, Qin Shiyu stepped forward and looked at Li Xianying calmly, saying, "Uncle Li, although I don't know why you have such a strong opinion about Jiang Tian, ​​he is my boyfriend. So, please understand, Uncle Li, Jiang Tian is where he is today entirely on his own merit. You don't need to constantly worry about someone coveting your family's power or trying to climb the social ladder. Although I don't want to be so harsh, compared to my family, it seems you don't need Jiang Tian to rely on you like that."

"Do your family know, niece?"

Li Xianying frowned deeply.

Qin Shiyu smiled faintly, "That's none of your concern, Uncle Li. Now, what brings you to my boyfriend? If there's nothing else, we have other matters to attend to, so we'll be leaving now."

Her attitude was neither humble nor arrogant, and she appeared extremely calm.

Or rather, the entire conversation was under Qin Shiyu's control.

Until Qin Shiyu left, Li Xianying hadn't uttered a complete sentence, mainly because Qin Shiyu's retort had completely thrown his thoughts into disarray.

Some things are better left unsaid, even if you know them. Why couldn't you choose Jiang Tian? Wasn't it because you were worried about your daughter's safety?

But these things couldn't be said, because Jiang Tian was a positive figure, a hero.

"Looks like I was overthinking it." Li Xianying frowned deeply. He truly hadn't expected Jiang Tian to be Qin Shiyu's boyfriend.

But how could that be?

And that's Qin Shiyu!

Among the three generations of elites in the entire capital, she was absolutely top-tier.

Especially since someone once said that it was only because Qin Shiyu was free-spirited and couldn't stand the intricacies of the system that she chose business; otherwise, her future achievements would have been unimaginable.

But even in business, relying solely on her own abilities, she created terrifying brilliance.

"I'm going to drive."

Meanwhile, inside the luxurious Rolls-Royce, Qin Shiyu feigned composure, looking at the windshield. However, Jiang Tian, ​​sitting in the passenger seat, immediately noticed the redness on Qin Shiyu's pale ears.

Jiang Tian looked down at their clasped hands, then subtly released them, a faint smile on his face. "You helped me again."

"You saved me, isn't that what I should do?" Qin Shiyu drove off.

However, her voice was completely different from her previous assertive tone; it sounded very weak now.

What she should do?

Jiang Tian thought of Li Qingqing. Although Li Qingqing hadn't done anything wrong, he had saved her, only to find himself in a mess of trouble and inexplicably labeled a "phoenix man" (a man from a poor background who achieves success).

How could he not feel resentful?

He, Jiang Tian, ​​a recipient of the Special Merit Award and multiple First-Class Merits, at twenty-two years old, had already become a second-level police superintendent—a historic figure—and now he was inexplicably labeled a "phoenix man."

Looking at it this way, Qin Shiyu seemed so understanding.

And not only that.

Then he looked at Wang Yifei, and thinking of her, Jiang Tian's brow twitched. Although he hadn't seen her in a long time, the memory was still vivid.

That kind of trouble should be left to Xiao Bo.

But Xiao Bo is still detained at the Municipal Public Security Bureau. If there are no problems during the subsequent review, he will probably be released.

However, last time Jiang Tian made his move, he didn't hold back much; he even broke Xiao Bo's nose.

After being arrested, she didn't receive timely treatment, and it's estimated she'll be somewhat disfigured upon release. Jiang Tian still vividly remembers seeing her yesterday.

Compared to these events, one can truly appreciate Qin Shiyu's loyalty and righteousness, which deeply moved Jiang Tian.

Especially when Jiang Tian had a sudden inspiration: "You founded Dongling Capital in Donghai, didn't you?"

During this period, if he remembered correctly, many internet unicorns were snapped up by foreign capital in their early stages, resulting in huge profits—returns of tens of millions to billions, hundreds of billions, or even trillions were commonplace.

Since Jiang Tian himself was unlikely to go into business within the system, entrusting this intelligence to Qin Shiyu might allow her to achieve similar success in the future.

He originally wanted to entrust it to Zhao Qiuni, but Zhao Qiuni was still relatively inexperienced and lacked experience. Jiang Tian decided that after receiving his next first-class merit award and having detailed investment intelligence, he could have Zhao Qiuni handle the project.

It's better to entrust such large-scale investments to Qin Shiyu; at least, it's infinitely better than letting foreign capital profit from it.

"There's an instant messaging company in Guangzhou..."

Looking at Qin Shiyu, with her terrifying background, terrifying abilities, and terrifying financial scale, such an investment is practically a veil in China; absolutely no investor could resist it.



Chapter 545 Target Direction, Rewriting History


Next, Jiang Tian brought up the issue of the internet. In 2003, the instant messaging unicorn in Guangzhou had only been established for a few years.

In other words, it was unclear whether the Hong Kong investor had invested in it yet, but even if they had, it wouldn't matter, because for Qin Shiyu, it wouldn't affect anything.

Given his power and status, if he were to intervene, an instant messaging company that hadn't shown any future prospects and couldn't even find a profit point wouldn't be taken seriously.

“Instant messaging?”

Qin Shiyu was utterly astonished.

“Do you believe this company's future market value will be at least several trillion, even hundreds of billions?” Jiang Tian said with a smirk.

Hiss!!!

Qin Shiyu's head exploded. Several trillion, even hundreds of billions?

This… Qin Shiyu's beautiful eyes widened, staring at Jiang Tian in disbelief. What did several trillion, even hundreds of billions mean? Even the US's system software didn't have such a high market value.

But those who haven't experienced the impact of the internet simply cannot comprehend the concept of the internet and how terrifyingly powerful it became over the next decade or so.

Thinking about the internet wars of later years, Jiang Tian knew that with his current status and position, it would be difficult for him to enter the business world.

"If necessary, take as many shares as possible, leave some for the founding team, invest more money, and then hold onto those shares," Jiang Tian said casually.

This…

Qin Shiyu's breathing quickened. Even though Dongling Capital's current market value was over 10 billion, compared to world-class investment institutions, it was still very small, extremely small.

But in China, in 2003, it was considered one of the top investment companies, without exception.

Even Qin Shiyu found it hard to believe.

"It won't take long, at most five years to fully realize its potential. In less than ten years, you'll witness the birth of a unicorn. If you're considering entering the market, now should be your last chance."

The Hong Kong company from 2003 has probably already invested. Jiang Tian is worried that if they wait too long, and the African company invests, it will be very difficult for Qin Shiyu to get another investment.

Although it could still yield many times the return, it's still not quite the same.

"Also, there's a company in Hangzhou called Tao Yi Tao. If possible, try to invest in them," Jiang Tian continued.

Judging from the current pace, Qin Shiyu's gratitude is evident, and her standing in Jiang Tian's eyes is rising rapidly. Of course, Jiang Tian isn't stupid; he won't be easily fooled or blindly fawned over by someone who shows a little kindness.

This is purely because Jiang Tian is too adept at psychology and can see through Qin Shiyu's behavior at a glance. He can almost instantly discern her personality and, most importantly, her true nature.

"You mean Taobao, which just launched this year?" Qin Shiyu asked, her face full of surprise.

"That's right. The concept of online shopping has just emerged and hasn't caused much of a stir yet, but in the coming years, it will become countless times more terrifying than the last. It would be even better if you knew about it." Jiang Tian smiled.

Qin Shiyu's lips twitched. "That Taobao boss contacted me, but he seemed like a complete fraud back then. After listening to him, I kicked him out. Later, I heard he got invested in by Boss Sun."

Jiang Tian rubbed his forehead. This guy was no less powerful than the one in Yangcheng!

The group he founded had a future market value that was terrifyingly high, conservatively estimated at trillions.

Even a small investment of tens of millions now could potentially become a terrifying billions in the future.

Jiang Tian was helpless, but thankfully, Qin Shiyu's learning and comprehension abilities were simply terrifying, especially her sensitivity to finance.

"Buying things online... unfortunately, I subjectively thought he was a fraud, so I barely listened to anything he said." Qin Shiyu's face showed some regret.

With her intelligence, how could she not understand the terrifying market Jiang Tian described? If all of China's more than one billion people were trained to shop online,

then the entire platform would become an incredibly massive and terrifying platform.

The more Qin Shiyu thought about it, the faster her heart raced.

Jiang Tian didn't mention anything about the physical assets, because it was unnecessary. Qin Shiyu had far more inside information than him about investing in physical businesses and developing projects.

As for the internet sector, he initially considered investing some money, but then realized that with his limited funds, no one would really pay him any attention.

It was already a miracle if anyone even bothered to acknowledge him.

You have to understand that investment isn't just about money; the most important thing is what benefits the investor, or capital, can bring to the company's development.

Any company with ambition prioritizes the benefits capital can bring.

Other conditions are secondary.

Even the price is secondary; the most important thing is the power of capital and the convenience and assistance it provides for the company's development.

Clearly, Dongling Capital, at any time, is far ahead in the entire domestic capital circle.

Nothing Dongling Capital sets its sights on can escape its grasp, and in China, very few dare to pursue it openly.

"My God, can all these internet companies really grow that massively?"

Trillions.

Even starting out, they're all worth trillions.

Are trillions as common as cabbages?

Even now, the top 500 companies, or even the top companies globally, might not even be worth trillions.

Of course, we won't talk about those hidden in the shadows, at least that's how it appears on the surface.

Next, Jiang Tian analyzed internet development for Qin Shiyu. From what Jiang Tian understood, Qin Shiyu not only didn't know much about the internet industry, but she also didn't really like this idea that seemed to have no output.

A typical case of her thinking being out of touch.

Jiang Tian finally understood why, despite Qin Shiyu's almost superhuman abilities, she still couldn't compete with overseas capital, and even some domestic capital had surpassed Dongling Capital.

Her investment strategy was flawed.

Ultimately, Dongling Capital, which Qin Shiyu founded, never reached the top tier.

But now, Jiang Tian could easily change his thinking.

At this point, Jiang Tian analyzed the future and core of the internet for Qin Shiyu, changing her perspective.

This made Jiang Tian quite puzzled.

Jiang Tian had absolutely no idea what Dongling Capital would look like ten or twenty years from now.

But Jiang Tian was very excited.

“That Li Xianying… be careful. She won’t do anything to me, but she might have a problem with you.”

Qin Shiyu sat in the driver’s seat, leading Jiang Tian towards the construction site.

In reality, Qin Shiyu’s construction site was, in essence, located in a mountainous area.

This collaboration with Yunhai wasn’t a small project, but a massive one: an amusement park.

Otherwise, Qin Shiyu wouldn’t have come.

When they arrived at the construction site, they were unaware that Li Xianying had already arrived at the Municipal Bureau.

And at that moment, the Municipal Bureau meeting was reaching its most intense stage.



Chapter 546 Anyone who hinders development will be utterly eliminated.


Ultimately, Jiang Tian's position is too low; he's far below Li Xianying's level. Even a single word from Li Xianying could cause him considerable trouble.

Jiang Tian simply smiled and said, "That won't happen. After all, I saved his daughter. I can't really repay kindness with enmity, unless..."

Jiang Tian chuckled.

Don't be fooled by the somewhat threatening tone of Li Xianying's words. If Li Xianying actually dared to trip up Jiang Tian, ​​her reputation would be ruined by gossip.

Small people below know about this, but many above do.

Soon.

Qin Shiyu drove Jiang Tian to the construction site.

This was a large amusement park located in Yunnan Province, with a projected investment of nearly one billion yuan.

Qin Shiyu hadn't originally planned this investment, but after Jiang Tian's sudden emergence, whether Qin Shiyu saw the potential of Yunhai's development or heard some rumors, she ultimately agreed to the investment inspection with Mu Feng.

However, investing in the small town she had previously chosen was impossible, mainly because it was too remote and had caused such a significant impact last time.

Especially since Qin Shiyu had been kidnapped.

In short, Qin Shiyu harbored deep resentment towards that place.

Later, she simply changed locations, investing directly in a more prosperous area of ​​Yunhai.

Of course, the corresponding costs increased significantly.

"This is it."

The journey wasn't short, and Jiang Tian's gaze gradually became serious. Putting aside everything else,

an investment of over a billion yuan, the construction of a giant amusement park, would have a huge boost to the local economy and tourism.

Most importantly, once the amusement park was located in Yunhai, it would attract tourists from the entire surrounding area of ​​Yun Province.

The resulting increase in catering and accommodation consumption would all contribute to GDP!

There's another aspect.

"This amusement park involves three parties: our investment company, Mufeng from your Yunnan province, and Shanghui Group from Beijing."

Large-scale amusement park projects like this almost always involve multiple investors to mitigate risk.

Over a billion yuan.

That's an absolutely terrifying scale.

As for Shanghui Group, Jiang Tian knew a bit about it. This group is a top-tier theme park operation and construction group in China, with investments across the country.

They also operate many extremely popular anime series and control numerous themed exhibitions.

Therefore, when they go to a location, they not only build a large-scale amusement park but also tailor it to the local characteristics.

Yunhai's development had been phenomenal before, and Shanghui Group had previously planned to invest there, but it was later halted for unknown reasons.

“Actually, it's because I'm acquainted with Shanghui's boss. The last investment was suspended, apparently because a local group in Yunhai jumped in halfway, but then stopped because their asking price was too high. I'm investing alongside you, partly because I'm familiar with Shanghui, and of course, partly because I believe you can solve this problem.” Qin Shiyu's gaze softened slightly as she looked at Jiang Tian.

That's right.

Even a powerful dragon can't suppress a local snake.

In Yunhai, it's fair to say that even a small area can be dominated by powerful local bullies.

This has always been a problem—there are too many local bullies.

Even with Qin Shiyu's unfathomable and terrifying background, offending people and mobilizing vast resources for an investment with uncertain returns, resulting in a net loss, is simply not worthwhile.

And now...

a major problem has arisen.

"Mu Feng's company also has shares. It was mainly Mu Feng who spearheaded the effort, with Secretary Mu's influence behind it, that led Shang Hui to consider continuing to invest in Yunhai, but on the condition that I also participate."

Qin Shiyu explained, making Jiang Tian understand why Mu Feng had gone to such lengths to get Qin Shiyu to invest.

But it must be said...

Jiang Tian recalled that it indeed didn't make sense. In 2003, even second-tier cities across the country had large amusement parks.

But in Yunhai, let alone now, in Jiang Tian's memory, it seemed that it wasn't until many years after Yunhai was severely damaged and its economy plummeted that a medium-sized amusement park project appeared.

Sure enough.

Jiang Tian's heart skipped a beat. There were too many criminal groups hindering Yunhai's development.

"Where are those causing trouble at the construction site?" Jiang Tian's eyes turned cold.

Hindering Yunhai's development meant standing against millions of people, it meant being an enemy of the people.

Most importantly, it was because of these chaotic local bullies.

The opportunity to become a leading city, to become a first-tier city, was completely lost.

All the hard work and development was gone.

Jiang Tian's expression was only slightly serious, but the cold light and murderous intent in his eyes sent a chill down Qin Shiyu's spine, raising goosebumps on her fair arms.

Only then did Qin Shiyu suddenly remember the young man in the passenger seat.

Once upon a time, they had achieved countless glorious feats.

"It's not a big deal, but last night a group of about twenty people, armed with weapons, came to the construction site and vandalized it. The guards had their legs broken, causing serious problems for the project's progress. The main concern is that if more people come, the project will be impossible to continue," Qin Shiyu complained speechlessly.

This investment is considerable.

Qin Shiyu's Dongling Capital invested several hundred million yuan, while Mu Feng himself only held a very small share, based on initial loans and land he bought in previous years.

But it's clear...

Can Mu Feng handle this kind of thing?

The answer is absolutely yes, but how to handle it is another question.

Seeking help from Secretary Mu is not impossible, but will it cause problems if Secretary Mu allows his subordinates to interfere in his family's asset investment?

This is another significant issue.

And Qin Shiyu understands even more clearly that the most suitable person to handle this matter is Jiang Tian.

To put it bluntly, Jiang Tian is currently wielding considerable influence and is at the height of his power. Having accumulated so many achievements, he could easily mobilize a massive amount of resources should he intervene.

Although Jiang Tian is in charge of anti-drug work, criminal organizations are inherently part of that field.

"I don't know about other things, but in Yunhai, anyone who dares to hinder economic development will have their claws chopped off."

Jiang Tian spoke calmly, not out of arrogance.

Having solved so many major cases, this one was nothing to him.

Besides, it wasn't just about Qin Shiyu; Jiang Tian considered Yunhai his own backyard. The better Yunhai's economy developed, the better his hometown would develop. The city's continuous improvement and the creation of the Southeast Economic Zone were absolute bottom lines for Jiang Tian and the millions of people in Yunhai, which he would never allow anyone to violate.

Furthermore, Jiang Tian had learned about the situation in detail on the way. Upon arriving at the construction site, he met Shang Hui's manager and Mu Feng, who were both incredibly enthusiastic upon seeing him.

Jiang Tian didn't presume to act rashly. After thinking for a moment, he called Miss Qiu: "Xiao Qiu, come over."



Chapter 547 Hong Shiwu's confession: Explosion, a complete explosion.


"Who are you?"

The person in charge of Shanghui Group, seeing that Qin Shiyu had brought Jiang Tian, ​​initially didn't look at Jiang Tian, ​​assuming he was just a follower. His gaze shifted to behind Qin Shiyu.

"President Qin, where is the person you were looking for?"

Yu Yao, the person in charge of Shanghui Group, looked around behind Qin Shiyu. Seeing no one, she looked at Qin Shiyu with a visibly confused expression.

Jiang Tian had heard Qin Shiyu mention Yu Yao before he arrived.

She was considered quite independent in Beijing. Her family situation was complicated; in short, there was severe patriarchal favoritism. As the daughter, she was abused from a young age. Even when she had excellent grades, her family couldn't afford the tuition, forcing her to drop out of school. Her two older brothers, whose grades were far inferior, went to university, but they didn't amount to much after graduation.

On the other hand, Yu Yao, with her resilient personality and good fortune, was noticed and cultivated by the CEO of Shanghui Group, eventually rising through the ranks to a high-level position, known for her decisive and efficient work style.

Jiang Tian had been slightly curious upon arrival, but only out of curiosity. He glanced at her briefly and, sure enough, she possessed a mature professional demeanor, smooth hair, and looked to be under thirty.

Because Qin Shiyu was familiar with Shanghui Group, she was also very familiar with Yu Yao, knowing many inside stories, and their relationship seemed quite good.

At this moment, Yu Yao frowned slightly.

It had to be said that after seeing the construction site today, the damage was extremely severe.

The construction schedule was completely delayed. Of course, the worst fear was that they would come here every few days looking for trouble; then they wouldn't be able to do anything at all.

Just as Yu Yao was at her wit's end, she looked at Mu Feng, this local strongman. Yes, Shanghui Group had its eye on Mu Feng's local connections.

But Mu Feng simply shrugged, his face full of embarrassment, leaving Yu Yao speechless.

Good heavens, what did they bring you here for?

Did they really think they were here to give you a share of the profits?

In reality, Mu Feng's life was truly miserable. Early in his career, when he first entered the officialdom, his straightforward and inflexible personality led to constant difficulties and made it unbearable for him. He had no choice but to resign and go into business, already in his thirties at the time.

After leaving government service, thanks to his connection with Secretary Mu, he stumbled along the way, managing to barely make a name for himself. However, to invest in Shanghui Group's amusement park project, he took out loans and mortgages, gambling everything on acquiring a large plot of land. The land alone was enough to secure a partial share.

This large amusement park, if successful, would be a veritable goldmine.

It served as a safety net, which is why, when things went wrong, Mu Feng was contemplating suicide. If Shanghui reneged on their promise, Mu Feng would undoubtedly lose everything, with no chance of recovery.

Having spent his life in business, Mu Feng didn't have many connections within the system, nor within the police force. He was hesitant to involve the old man, fearing it might implicate him. Besides, using the old man for such thugs would be a waste of his talents.

Just as Mu Feng was worrying about how to resolve this,

Qin Shiyu happened to take over.

Mu Feng was happy to accept the situation. Regardless, the situation in Yunhai was too sensitive. It was a family business, and if his father abused his power, someone could be killed at any crucial moment.

Furthermore, Mu Feng was indecisive and didn't know what to do.

Yu Yao, on the other hand, breathed a sigh of relief after hearing Qin Shiyu's confident assurances that she would resolve the issue.

After all, Yu Yao knew a little about Qin Shiyu's background.

With Qin Shiyu's connections, resolving this issue should be more than a matter of course.

But where were the people she had brought?

Yu Yao looked at the empty space behind her.

"President Qin, the project is not to be underestimated. If it's not resolved in a day, construction cannot begin, and the daily losses are incalculable," Yu Yao sighed.

After saying this, Yu Yao thought of her cat from yesterday.

It had been killed.

If she didn't know Qin Shiyu's identity, Yu Yao truly wouldn't want to stay in Yunhai for even a day longer. It was simply outrageous.

“I used to read about Yunhai online and thought it was just hearsay, but after coming here myself, I realize it truly lives up to its reputation.”

Yu Yao had known this all along and wouldn't have come.

“Introducing myself, from the Municipal Bureau.” Jiang Tian stepped forward.

“You?”

Yu Yao stared at Jiang Tian's young face, completely dumbfounded. Seriously, you sent someone this young to fool me?

“President Qin, please stop joking. What time is it?” Yu Yao looked at Qin Shiyu.

Qin Shiyu frowned slightly and said calmly, “If he can't solve this, then no one in the entire Yunhai can.”

Buzz!!!

Yu Yao stared at Jiang Tian's face in disbelief.

Mu Feng quickly stepped forward, his face visibly relaxed, all traces of his earlier panic gone. "Xiao Jiang, I'm completely relieved now that you're here. With you here, everything's fine. There's one more thing. Last night, when President Yu was staying at our hotel in Yunhai, his pet cat was killed. Its head was on the dining table. Then the construction site was attacked. This was a premeditated attack. Even though President Yu reported it, and the criminal investigators went, they didn't find anything."

This era was very unfriendly to those in the police system. Specifically, the coverage of surveillance was extremely poor. In 2003, except for some important occasions, there was practically no surveillance.

The efficiency of solving cases was naturally extremely slow and cumbersome.

However, this was not a problem for Jiang Tian at all.

"Since they made a threat, they must have had a purpose, a general target, or rather, a suspect?" Jiang Tian stroked his chin.

The world is a bustling place, everyone is driven by profit.

Yu Yao glanced at Qin Shiyu and was utterly astonished to see her staring intently at Jiang Tian.

She seemed even more shocked than before.

Because Yu Yao had known Qin Shiyu for a long time, and precisely because she understood her, she knew that she never expected Qin Shiyu to show such a girlish side in front of others.

This world has gone mad.

But Yu Yao, knowing her place, quickly explained, "I've been keeping an eye on things here. If I had to name a suspect, it would be Yunhai's Huayu Group. They approached us for investment right after we started investing. Normally, there's nothing wrong with that, but they wanted half the shares for 100 million. What were we getting out of investing over a billion? After we refused their outrageous demands, their company representative threatened to ruin our project forever."

"Yunhai actually has such arrogant people?"

Jiang Tian was furious.

(The rest of the text is unrelated and appears to be a separate excerpt.)

At that moment, inside the Municipal Public Security Bureau, Miss Qiu hung up the phone.

Looking at the scene before her, she felt her blood rushing and her whole body trembling.

Not for any other reason, but simply because...

Hong Shiwu confessed.

He told the whole story.

Of course, it wasn't Hong Shiwu who confessed; it was all the financial information provided by that woman named Su Su who compromised and reported it.

Su Su even left a hidden door in the dark web backend of YuGou.com.

In other words, she could potentially overthrow the entire YuGou.com at any time.

After seeing Su Su reveal everything, Hong Shiwu completely resigned himself to his fate and confessed to all his crimes. But if that was the end of it, no, a huge mistake.

Because what followed was a moment that would send chills down everyone's spine.

Nothing else.

It was all because of the news announced by Minister Tan, which caused an uproar.

A complete uproar.

Minister Tan: "Just now..."



Chapter 548: The case is too big; Shang Mingyan is terrified.


Compared to this matter, the investigation Jiang Tian mentioned into the amusement park issue was actually a minor matter.

In reality, almost the entire nation's attention is focused on Yunhai. Even Mu Feng could only watch helplessly as small cases involving local bullies escalated. And it's possible that even Qin Shiyu wouldn't dare do anything in Yunhai at this time.

Because too much attention is focused on Yunhai.

With everyone's eyes on Yunhai, any problems could easily cause a huge public outcry.

In contrast, Jiang Tian doesn't seem to have any reservations about his actions. In fact, it's uncertain whether the problem here is big or small, but it's clear that the other side doesn't even consider Shanghui Group or Mu Feng a threat.

This is a major problem; the people behind it definitely have considerable power.

Ultimately, Yunhai's development depends on resolving the local bullying issue.

Inclusiveness is the first element of progress.

At this moment, the city bureau was completely silent.

The enormous conference room, built just a few years ago by the municipal police bureau, is enormous, resembling a university auditorium.

This is mainly because Yunhai has faced numerous problems, leading to continuous support from higher authorities for the Yunhai police system, coupled with substantial funding for Yunhai's development.

Having reaped considerable benefits, the entire Yunhai municipal police bureau has also benefited, especially this conference room, which boasts hundreds, even thousands, of seats. In the center, leaders from various departments listen to speeches from above.

And the incident had just occurred.

After Hong Shiwu regained consciousness, the municipal police bureau immediately prepared for a protracted investigation, given the magnitude of the case and the fact that he was the main mastermind, a figure of considerable power and influence.

Similar to Shang Mingyan of the special task force, they immediately brought in top interrogation experts for a preliminary questioning.

To everyone's surprise, after waking up, the previously silent Hong Shiwu became incredibly forthcoming and candid.

Why say things like that, even drawing inferences from one instance to another?

This moment stunned Shang Mingyan, leaving him momentarily speechless. But then he understood: "This means giving up all treatment, or rather, losing all hope and having no more desires, wanting to end it all."

Ultimately, it's a matter of insufficient psychological resilience. After all, from holding billions of dollars and possessing the insane money-making tool of Fishbuy.com, becoming incredibly wealthy and enjoying the most luxurious life in the world...

It's like a former deposed monarch who enjoyed decades of wealth, only to have his empire vanish overnight, everything collapsing, falling from heaven to hell in an instant, then hanging himself from a crooked tree.

The key is that Hong Shiwu understands even more clearly where everything he has comes from.

Now he understands even more clearly that everything is over, a fall from heaven to hell, and there's no way he can escape this cage for the rest of his life.

Thinking this way, giving up all hope and simply lying down is psychologically consistent.

In the short time that followed, Hong Shiwu confessed to his crimes clearly, including all the details of the offenses.

But as the confessions deepened, increasingly shocking numbers and scales emerged.

After obtaining all the testimonies, Shang Mingyan didn't dare delay and immediately went to the conference room.

Coincidentally,

at that moment, Li Xianying, accompanied by her secretary, came up from downstairs and happened to encounter Shang Mingyan in the second-floor interrogation room.

"Professor Shang,"

Li Xianying called out to Shang Mingyan with a slightly surprised expression.

Shang Mingyan, holding the documents, turned around and saw Li Xianying's astonished face: "What are you doing here?"

But then, Shang Mingyan thought of Li Qingqing.

As people from Beijing, although there were many officials, they were often unfamiliar with each other, and even rarely met.

Most of them were practically strangers.

Shang Mingyan was from the Fifth Bureau, while Li Xianying was a local official; logically, they shouldn't know each other. But coincidentally, they had met during the investigation of a major case.

"I've come to pick up Qingqing, and while I'm at it, to take care of Qingqing's matter." Li Xianying's expression changed slightly after thinking of Jiang Tian and Qin Shiyu.

This was immediately apparent to Shang Mingyan, whose micro-expressions were second nature.

"Li Qingqing is a witness in an important case. She's resting in my office right now. If you want to go, just go directly there. I have other things to do." Shang Mingyan was in a hurry to leave, not having time to talk to Li Xianying.

"Wait, is it the case on the dark web?" Li Xianying asked hastily.

He remembered that this case involved his daughter, and most importantly, it seemed that Jiang Tian was investigating it. Thinking this, Li Xianying frowned slightly.

No matter what, Jiang Tian had repeatedly refused to give him face.

This had ignited considerable anger in Li Xianying's heart. After all, what were their respective statuses? In Li Xianying's eyes, she had already humbled herself, and Jiang Tian still wouldn't give her face.

Even if she had managed to curry favor with Qin Shiyu...

Although he was somewhat wary, the young man was being far too presumptuous.

He was destined not to go far in this system.

Thinking this through, Li Xianying felt it necessary to understand the case as well. As for whether he was qualified?

Given his status, Li Xianying believed he was qualified, even if it wasn't against the rules. However, if it weren't a highly confidential matter already solved, there would be opportunities for in-depth discussion.

Shang Mingyan initially wanted to refuse outright, but then suddenly remembered: "This case also involves the capital. Come along."

This case was enormous.

Even Shang Mingyan was shocked by what he saw.

Mainly, the case wasn't over.

Because it involved so many aspects, and much of the information was still general, lacking specific details, Shang Mingyan could already vouch for it.

This was absolutely the most heinous case he had ever handled in all his major cases, the first he had ever encountered.

It involved far too many areas.

"Involving the capital?" Li Xianying was dumbfounded.

Although he only oversaw the government system and was far from being the top leader, how significant could a case involving the capital possibly be?

Furthermore, having never worked in the public security, procuratorate, or judicial system, Li Xianying's understanding was somewhat limited.

So, he couldn't understand it no matter how hard he tried. Wasn't this just a case of a domestic individual infiltrating overseas and operating a criminal community on the dark web?

How serious could it be?

And the impact, at most, would only involve overseas influence; what did it have to do with Beijing?

This was also why, after learning about the case, Li Xianying immediately threatened the police when he learned they were preparing to submit an application for the August 1st Intermediate People's Court—he had always believed there was absolutely no chance.

But now, it seemed...

his understanding was flawed.



Chapter 549 Utter Madness: The Case Exposed, Everyone Goes Crazy


On one hand, Jiang Tian was too young; the August 1st crackdown seemed impossible to him—there was no precedent. On the other hand, he didn't know much about the dark web or online marketplaces like FishBuy.

In 2003, the internet hadn't been developing in China for very long, and the total number of internet users nationwide was still relatively small.

Some people with outdated knowledge struggled to keep up with the times.

Of course, this didn't include Li Xianying. Li Xianying was quite capable, but his understanding of the internet and online platforms was limited.

In his mind, Hong Shiwu was on par with a major international drug lord. While Jiang Tian had made significant contributions, they weren't as professional as those within the police system, who understood the terrifying nature and value of the case.

So, Li Xianying went along with it. Initially, he thought that helping Jiang Tian and then asking for repayment on August 1st was already a huge favor.

However, Jiang Tian not only didn't appreciate it but also humiliated him in this way.

Li Xianying had been furious all the way there, and when she saw Jiang Tian, ​​she had already suppressed her anger, only to be treated this way by him.

"Heh, Professor Shang, I know internet cases are far-reaching, but even with so many involved, there's no way to solve them all. We can't investigate them one by one, involving the whole world; it's unlikely we'll get much out of it. Even if that so-called 'FishBuy.com' confesses everything, and we have some evidence, so what?" Li Xianying shook her head.

The August 1st Army Achievement Award isn't so easy to get. In other words, Jiang Tian isn't qualified. The first hurdle is seniority; Jiang Tian simply doesn't meet the requirements.

Holding an August 1st Army Achievement Award at twenty-two? Isn't that ridiculous?

On the other hand, I'm not hindering you out of respect for Li Qingqing; I'm even supporting you. With her support, even without any chance, you have a better foundation to get in.

And you're not even grateful? Does this kid really think he's some kind of superhuman?

Shang Mingyan frowned deeply. She had sensed something was wrong earlier, and now, after hearing those words, her expression instantly turned grim.

Speaking out about other cases would be one thing, but this case...

On a grand scale, it concerns major strategic issues, potentially even influencing the global situation.

On a smaller scale, it's a terrifying, massive transnational terrorist case.

In short, it's a heinous terrorist case, and for Li Xianying to describe it was somewhat disrespectful.

"What do you know? Do you even know how to solve a case?"

If it weren't for their past friendship and the camaraderie Li Xianying showed during the investigation, Shang Mingyan would have been ready to unleash a torrent of abuse on Li Xianying.

Whether Li Xianying held a higher position than her was irrelevant; it was her knowledge and reputation that made Shang Mingyan so terrifying.

The authority of Shang Mingyan's words has been tested internationally and witnessed firsthand. Jiang Tian is actually taking this step, and has already achieved some success.

No wonder neighboring Myanmar has gone mad.

Jiang Tian was stirring up trouble next door, doing so much, killing so many people, solving so many cases, and eradicating so many criminal groups.

As a result, people next door seemed to be praising him internationally. Whenever social stability was involved, Jiang Tian was almost always in the news.

At just over twenty years old, seemingly emerging at twenty and already achieving brilliant results, the officials in neighboring Myanmar were showering him with praise, almost like a god.

This was actually Jiang Tian's authority, which, as time passed, became recognized by most countries as Jiang Tian's terrifying investigative abilities.

What Jiang Tian lacked was precisely this kind of foundation.

Or rather, seniority.

"Comrade Li Xianying, regarding the seriousness of these cases, it's understandable that you haven't worked in the police system and wouldn't know, but I also hope that you won't speak carelessly about things you don't understand," Shang Mingyan said, his brow furrowed slightly, his displeasure evident.

He even addressed her by her first name.

Before Li Xianying could react, Shang Mingyan continued, "Besides, the case is quite serious and involves a wide range of people, so I hope you'll take it seriously."

"Of course."

Li Xianying agreed verbally, her mind racing, but she wasn't really that concerned.

How could Yunhai's case involve the capital?

Even if it did, it was probably just a few fugitives.

This serious expression was, in the end, a bit of an overreaction, but Li Xianying didn't take it too seriously. She frowned slightly and said, "Then I'll go with you to take a look."

Shang Mingyan didn't respond further.

Regarding Li Xianying and Jiang Tian, ​​Shang Mingyan was busy with her own case and didn't know much.

However, Li Xianying's attitude, especially her micro-expressions after mentioning Jiang Tian's solving of the Hong Shiwu case, had already given her a clue. Li Xianying clearly harbored some resentment towards Jiang Tian.

Shang Mingyan, however, had no time to deal with either, nor did he pay any attention to Li Xianying following behind him, and went directly to the conference room.

At this time, the meeting was actually nearing its end.

Shang Mingyan had just received Hong Shiwu's message during the meeting and left the conference room immediately. Now, upon his return, Minister Tan was already giving a summary of the meeting.

"Such a large entourage?" Li Xianying clicked her tongue in surprise as she entered the conference room.

There were quite a few people from the police system present.

Most importantly, Li Xianying's eyes became slightly serious. The conference screen clearly displayed the words: Provincial-level Meeting.

Li Xianying was still thinking about this when she found a place to sit and listen.

She was still pondering what had happened.

But just then, when Shang Mingyan handed the documents to Minister Tan, she saw that Minister Tan's expression had drastically changed.

His expression went from astonishment to disbelief, and finally to shock.

This suddenly gave Li Xianying a sense of foreboding.

"They just said it involved the capital, really?" Li Xianying's heart was racing.

Meanwhile, Minister Tan was genuinely shocked.

Mainly because the detailed information he held about Yugou.com and Shi Hongwu's criminal record were quite alarming.

The further he read, the more Minister Tan gasped.

He gasped frantically.

"Is it true?" Minister Tan looked at Shang Mingyan in shock.

"I just personally interrogated him, and it's almost certainly true. Many clues can be found, and it's been confirmed by Su Su's subordinates," Shang Mingyan nodded.

"As expected." Minister Tan's heart was racing. Even though he had taken this very seriously, he hadn't expected this case to be so far beyond his expectations.

"Comrades, there's been a major update. Just now, Comrade Jiang Tian arrested a criminal ringleader and seized 3.8 billion US dollars in illicit funds. Furthermore, they cracked a criminal network involving over 100 countries worldwide. In recent years, the initial estimate for the sale of various types of heroin is at least several hundred tons. The amount of money involved in providing platforms to facilitate these transactions is incalculable. The scale of the case is enormous, unprecedented, and extremely heinous. The 3.8 billion US dollars have already been recovered, and the number of members in the criminal gang is enormous."

"Domestically, there are multiple criminal gangs collaborating with them. Globally, there are 76 major drug lords with whom they have regular partners. Each of these drug lords releases at least... tens of tons of drugs annually, and over the past ten years, each has been releasing hundreds of tons."

Especially...

Minister Tan's face instantly turned grim.

Because one of these drug lords was located in Beijing?

This is insane.

But as the saying goes, behind every glittering facade lies an equal darkness. This is true everywhere, even in the most prosperous areas of the world, where the hidden evils are unimaginable.

But that's somewhere else, not in the capital.

Boom!!!



Chapter 550 Fake? No, this will be the world's biggest case.


Boom!!!

It exploded.

It exploded.

This was a real explosion.
