Meng Qian, who was shouting, suddenly felt a chill on her wrist.

A click of a lock followed.

Meng Qian's expression froze.

Turning her head, she realized her hands were handcuffed behind her back.

"Who are you? Let me go! What do you want?" Meng Qian's heart pounded.

Ultimately, this seventeen-year-old delinquent, despite her earlier exaggerated and arrogant behavior, was now starting to panic a little in this situation.

"I'm a police officer. I'm giving you one last chance. Where is Guo Na?" Jiang Tian's expression was icy.

That cold gaze made Meng Qian's face turn pale.

"It has nothing to do with me. Chen Xu was in charge. They're in the grove."



Chapter 561 The bigger the storm, the more valuable the fish; fortune favors the bold.


Just then,

a black minivan drove along the wide road,

heading towards the villa area not far from the high school.

Guo Na was bound hand and foot, her face filled with terror.

That's right.

Even if Chen Xu was incredibly audacious, he wouldn't have gone so far as to force himself on someone in the school's grove.

Such an incident, once exposed, would cause him considerable trouble, so Chen Xu had simply found a minivan from the school.

Bound and tied up, they headed straight outside the school.

Of course, what made Guo Na's pupils shrink in disbelief was that Chen Xu, sitting next to her, was holding a small packet of white powder—a tiny amount, contained in a small, transparent bag, and it looked to be less than a gram or two.

However, Guo Na was not unfamiliar with the drug issue. Although she was young, Guo Na's father, Captain Guo, was a member of the anti-drug squad. Especially given the drug problem in Yunhai, which was spreading to teenagers, Captain Guo had naturally done a lot of educational work for Guo Na before his death.

And the harmful nature of this thing, etc.

The most terrifying thing about this stuff is that once you get hooked, it's all over. It's not just physical torture, but also excruciating mental anguish.

Once you're addicted, you're sinking deeper and deeper into a terrifying abyss. Ultimately, the price is a soulless body, becoming a walking corpse—living, but worse than dead.

And trying to quit—the physical and mental torment will haunt you for life.

Guo Na's eyes were filled with fear.

"You look terrified, hahaha!" Chen Xu's smile was somewhat sinister.

A madman.

This is a madman.

But is Chen Xu really a madman?

No.

Chen Xu also has a brain. In Yunhai, after all, it's the provincial capital, and there are quite a few people with status and power. Before targeting anyone, Chen Xu would at least learn about their background.

Regarding Guo Na, his current understanding is that she has already sacrificed herself.

When Captain Guo was alive, it would have been very difficult for Chen Xu to investigate. However, after Captain Guo's sacrifice, the confidentiality issue was lifted internally.

The confidentiality regarding her identity was lifted, but information about past missions wouldn't be released.

Those cases would be compiled into files and sealed away.

"Your father seems to be in drug enforcement, tsk tsk. If your father were alive and knew you used this stuff, would he...?" Chen Xu's smile grew increasingly sinister.

If Captain Guo were alive, Chen Xu might have been a little wary, but now, he wasn't worried at all.

Especially since even ordinary police officers wouldn't be able to help; the power and influence of his connections in both the legitimate and underworld circles were fully demonstrated in his case.

"Waaah..." Guo Na twisted her body frantically, her eyes filled with terror.

Then, right before Guo Na's eyes, Chen Xu handed the white powder to his henchman. This henchman, who had been unaware of the powder's presence and was already sniffling, opened the packet and began using it like a rabid dog.

"You bitch, going against me will cost you."

Chen Xu sneered.

Just then, as Chen Xu was about to do something, the phone rang, snapping him back to reality. Seeing the caller ID, he quickly answered.

"Dad," Chen Xu called out, still looking at Guo Na with amusement.

He enjoyed this feeling, this thrill, especially seeing the woman who had just looked down on him, even ignored him, now transformed under his intimidation.

Soon, Chen Xu's amusement faded, and he turned to his phone, his expression becoming serious. "Dad, what's up?"

Chen Xu dared not be disrespectful to his father on the other end of the line.

Because this man was truly ruthless, the real "Cloud Sea Knife."

The prestige of that nickname was absolutely terrifying.

A knife with "Yunhai" (a mythical sea of ​​clouds) added to its name. Once upon a time, Yunhai Yidao (a knife of the Cloud Sea) was virtually invincible throughout Yunhai, carving out a niche for itself with a single blade.

On the other end of the phone.

In a luxurious residential area of ​​Yunhai, Chen Qiang sat before an exquisite tea set, brewing tea with effortless skill, a testament to his mastery of the art.

"What are you doing, you bastard? Have you gotten into trouble again?" It must be said, Chen Qiang, the "One-Knife," knew Chen Xu quite well.

"Dad, no, absolutely not." Chen Xu hurriedly denied.

"That's for the best. Hmph, I warned you, last time was the last time. Otherwise, I'll kill you. Also, there's an important deal tonight, and I need you to personally oversee it." Chen Qiang said calmly.

"Dad, can I go?" Chen Xu was excited.

That's how Yunhai Yidao rose to power.

Having built his fortune through hard work and ruthlessness, how could he possibly run a legitimate business? The black and gray industries, with their exorbitant profits, had naturally grown very large by now. And once you've grown big, it's incredibly difficult, if not impossible, to turn back.

"This time you'll be coming along to learn. Also, the cops have noticed our operations, so your Uncle Guai will be with you. Be extremely careful during the transactions. If things get really bad, absolutely do not get caught by the cops," Chen Qiang said calmly.

Though his words sounded cold, they actually reflected Chen Qiang's complete confidence in his old friend, Lao Guai.

"I know, Dad, don't worry," Chen Xu assured him excitedly.

Mainly because previously they'd been involved in legitimate businesses, but those were few and far between; almost everything was illicit.

Now they'd finally touched the core of the industry.

"Things are getting tense in Yunhai lately. You need to be careful too. It's best not to get involved in these things anymore," Lao Guai couldn't help but offer words of comfort.

“Old Guai, haven’t you heard the saying, ‘The bigger the storm, the more valuable the fish; fortune favors the bold’?” Clearly, Chen Qiang, the man who had dominated Yunhai for years, was very confident.

“Ah Xu just called me, asking me to investigate someone,” Old Guai said hesitantly.

“Who?”

“One of them, already killed, seemed to be from the Narcotics Control Unit. I figured he was probably alright, so I didn’t pay much attention. But now I feel something’s off,” Old Guai said seriously.

Afterwards, Old Guai kept thinking about it.

Suddenly, he realized something terrifying.

“Why is he investigating the Narcotics Control Unit?” Chen Qiang asked, bewildered.

“Wait, the Narcotics Control Unit, isn’t that Killer Star’s team?” Chen Qiang suddenly realized.

The next moment, Chen Qiang’s phone rang almost simultaneously: “The boss is in trouble. Almost all the police officers in Yunhai have been mobilized. It seems like another crackdown is coming?”



Chapter 562 Which damned bastard had to provoke that murderous star?


"A crackdown?"

In that instant, both Lao Guai and Chen Qiang's gazes turned grave.

To be honest...

Recently, due to a series of cases, crackdowns have been occurring frequently. Every few days, there are searches and crackdowns everywhere.

As a result, several of Chen Qiang's companies have even encountered significant problems during this period, suffering extremely heavy losses.

Of course, every time a crackdown occurs, Chen Qiang is terrified. As the head of Yunhai,

While not exactly the kingpin of the underworld, Chen Qiang at least has connections in both the legitimate and criminal worlds. He can be said to be able to get accurate information immediately.

But this time, there has been no prior warning, which makes Chen Qiang feel uneasy, vaguely sensing that it's aimed at him.

"Why is there another crackdown suddenly?" Chen Qiang's heart pounded.

He couldn't understand it. The key was that he hadn't received any advance warning, and even after a brief moment of thought, Chen Qiang made a decisive decision.

Make a phone call.

Call the powerful backer behind him.

That's why it's said that someone who reaches this level and position can't possibly be without powerful backers; they all have some kind of backing.

Especially with connections in both the legal and illegal worlds. It's just that in the past, he'd kept it well hidden, and before this, he hadn't been caught. Or rather, Chen Qiang had always been discreet.

Plus, there were people above him covering for him.

"What did you say? A crackdown?"

The moment Chen Qiang dialed the number, the voice on the other end was filled with surprise and disbelief.

"Don't you know? The whole of Yunhai is in a frenzy right now. Police cars are everywhere, searching for anyone's ID." Chen Qiang suppressed his inner shock.

That's right.

It's gone mad outside.

They're investigating like crazy.

Chen Qiang was actually a little panicked; after all, no one knew if it was targeting him.

"Wait a minute, let me ask what's going on. You must keep a low profile. You should understand that Minister Tan and the others are in Yunhai right now. Yunhai is under national scrutiny. Any slight disturbance here will be devastating, and no one can save you." The voice on the other end of the phone was full of authoritative warning.

"Yes, yes, I understand, sir. Don't worry, I will. I've already strictly disciplined my men." Chen Qiang nodded and bowed as he hung up the phone, his respectful expression gradually turning cold.

But in the end, as if all his strength had been drained, his expression gradually calmed, and he let out a soft sigh.

Although Chen Qiang appeared outwardly powerful, he knew his own limitations.

No matter how much power he wielded, it was nothing compared to this person!

No one had the right to touch the power of the state apparatus.

Chen Qiang understood this.

No matter how powerful he became, he still had to act like a grandson before these two people.

However, Chen Qiang thought about the recent events. Apart from tonight's transaction, almost nothing else had happened.

All things considered.

They've already been very discreet.

Their past crimes have long been covered up.

"Old Guai, halt all transactions for today. Have your men cease all operations," Chen Qiang ordered.

"But what about this transaction?" Old Guai hesitated.

"No buts. Do as I say." Chen Qiang waved his hand.

At the same time.

Just as Chen Qiang's voice fell,

the phone suddenly rang.

Chen Qiang hurriedly answered.

The voice on the other end gradually relaxed: "Chen Qiang, I just asked what happened. It's a missing person case. As long as you didn't do it, you can relax."

Chen Qiang's heart skipped a beat: "Missing person? What missing person?"

"You should know that killer from the Narcotics Division, right? The only daughter of that killer's fallen leader has gone missing. It seems she was kidnapped or something. A martyr's child—that killer is furious," the voice on the other end said coldly.

The voice sounded somewhat apprehensive.

Furious.

Just two simple words.

The significance of this was beyond imagination. Everyone in Yunhai, with even a little influence, knew what that killer had done.

Although Jiang Tian had begun to be exposed, it was only the beginning.

In other words, Jiang Tian hadn't yet entered everyone's public eye.

However, for powerful people, especially the criminal organizations in Yunhai, the name Jiang Tian was legendary.

Every operation he undertook was a major case that shocked the world.

Each one was a horrific crime.

And when the investigations finally broke out, it was like pulling up a radish and pulling out the whole dregs—a thorough investigation.

Countless people were implicated.

Although the news hadn't leaked, many knew that the subsequent cases, though Jiang Tian hadn't continued to participate in or cause any stir, were simply because they were ordinary corruption cases that Jiang Tian no longer needed to investigate.

Naturally, other departments took over.

And these other departments were even directly from the capital.

Yes, you read that right. To cooperate with Jiang Tian's horrific cases, even the anti-corruption personnel were transferred from Beijing.

And the number of people implicated...

is countless.

That's why it's said that within the government, Jiang Tian's name is synonymous with ruthlessness. Not only is he inconspicuous on the outside, but the intricate web of criminal organizations also implicates countless people within the government.

Even the fallen leaders are coming one after another.

Of course, since those matters had nothing to do with Jiang Tian, ​​he didn't pay much attention. In reality, Jiang Tian knew that, to some extent, the higher-ups hadn't let him get involved in these corruption cases because of their protection.

Sometimes being too high-profile isn't a good thing.

Because a large number of people had already fallen because of him, if he were implicated as well, it would inevitably affect Jiang Tian's future career advancement.

"Tell me, of all people to mess with, why did they have to provoke that killer? Who was it that bastard had to do it? That killer finally got a couple of days off to rest, and someone still went looking for trouble. Isn't that just asking for trouble?" This dignified backer couldn't help but click his tongue in disbelief.

"Chen Qiang, what's wrong? Why aren't you saying anything?" The voice on the phone stopped teasing.

"Old leader, was he a policeman? A policeman who died in the line of duty?" Chen Qiang's voice trembled slightly.

"Nonsense, what kind of profession did that assassin have? You, sir, must have had the same profession. It's just that your rank wasn't high before, so you took care of that assassin a bit, hence the good relationship."

*Buzz!*



Chapter 563 He's gone mad, and he's connected to the Killer Star. You dare say he's just an ordinary high school student?


Chen Qiang was completely bewildered, his head buzzing. The leader's teasing words, even the joking and humorous tone, left Chen Qiang utterly confused.

Let's take a look.

From the very beginning, what his backer said, to the very end, seemed exactly the same as what Lao Guai had just said.

So, Chen Qiang covered his phone and looked at Lao Guai on the other end.

At this moment, Lao Guai was still unaware of what had happened. After all, he hadn't heard or understood the voice on the other end of the phone.

So when Lao Guai looked at Chen Qiang, seeing his sudden bewildered expression, he asked, somewhat puzzled, "Brother Qiang, what happened? Something went wrong?"

To be honest, Lao Guai noticed that Chen Qiang's expression was clearly very strange. Normally, no matter what happened, Chen Qiang would always handle things calmly, but now, his face was noticeably changing color, alternating between clear and purple, as if his expression was constantly shifting.

Even a fool would clearly sense something was wrong at this point—something was wrong from the inside out, seriously wrong.

“You just said that bastard Chen Xu asked you about someone?” Chen Qiang asked.

Old Guai didn’t understand why Chen Qiang asked this question, but he nodded slightly in agreement.

After all, Chen Xu had indeed asked him about someone.

Speaking of which, the Huayu Group’s influence in Yunhai was different from that of ordinary criminal groups.

Like ordinary companies, some have a single focus, while others have diversified operations.

Criminal groups are even more so. For example, the criminal groups Jiang Tian dealt with before were mostly composed of villains, but these villains actually had a relatively singular focus: making money, frantically making money, making money through drug trafficking, and having no interest in anything else.

And such forces, once uncovered, are easy to deal with. Following the clues, they are easily eliminated. Even those with powerful backers are easily taken down.

But similarly…

If development is diversified, then the problem becomes complicated. Take Wenye Group, for example. Its diversified development led to the downfall of countless officials within the system. Even though Jiang Tian wasn't directly involved, Wenye Group alone caused a terrifying earthquake throughout Yunhai.

Otherwise, why would Jiang Peng be able to rise so easily within a rigid system where every position is filled? It's because that position had become vacant.

Why was it vacant? Because Jiang Tian's repeated crackdowns on criminal groups resulted in wave after wave of officials falling from grace.

This is why, in the eyes of many colleagues within the system, Jiang Tian is practically a nemesis, and doesn't have much goodwill towards him.

Of course, another reason is that Yunhai's long-standing criminal activity has severely corrupted its internal structure.

In reality, most of the businesses of Wenye Group are legitimate. Although it was involved in drug trafficking, that was a legacy issue. Sometimes, turning over a new leaf is not so simple, especially for a company of this size. Once you go down a dark path, it is extremely difficult for a company of Wenye Group's size to turn back.

However, Huayu Group is different.

From the very beginning, Huayu Group started with illegal and criminal activities, including drug trafficking and organized crime.

Subsequently, 80% of its businesses were in the gray and black market, forming a complete industrial chain throughout Yunhai.

Especially in terms of scale, although its development was limited to Yunhai and it wasn't a province-wide enterprise, it reaped too many benefits in Yunhai, leading to its increasingly distorted and corrupt nature.

The gray and black market industries accounted for approximately 80% of its business, while Wenye Group's was only about 20%. Wenye Group was already on the path of transformation, but tragically, it was discovered by Jiang Tian at the last moment.

However, Huayu Group, having persisted on this path, had profits and assets far exceeding those of Wenye Group.

While the Wenye Group primarily operates in the real economy, focusing on issues related to people's livelihoods, the Huayu Group is entirely different. It's largely involved in organized crime and gray-market industries, generating exorbitant profits. The entire black market supply chain has become fully integrated into a commercialized industry.

The Huayu Group's industries and assets have even surpassed those of the Wenye Group.

Because of this, the backing required for the growth and expansion of these black and gray-market industries is far greater and more powerful than what the Wenye Group needed.

Within the Huayu Group, Lao Guai holds a rather unique position. While he may appear unremarkable on the surface, and many may not even know who he is,

in the underworld, Lao Guai is the second-in-command of the local tyrants.

The people he knows and the network of connections he has built over the years have corrupted countless individuals.

Even Chen Xu has to go through Lao Guai to get things done.

Old Guai, the assassin, felt a pang of unease. Only after asking his question did he realize that his boss, Chen Qiang, was staring intently at him.

It made him uneasy.

Even after killing so many people, both openly and secretly, this was the first time Old Guai had felt this uneasy.

You see, the most important qualities for someone who can thrive in the underworld are loyalty and a powerful charisma to command their subordinates.

But now, Old Guai was seeing Chen Qiang like this for the first time.

Fear?

Perhaps.

But how could he? Old Guai simply couldn't believe it. Even after countless life-or-death experiences, Old Guai had always been Chen Qiang's steadfast follower.

They had witnessed countless events together.

Almost all the shady jobs had been handled by Old Guai.

Having been through so much, so many life-or-death situations, he had never seen Chen Qiang like this before.

That look was clearly one of fear in his eyes.

But he simply refused to believe that Chen Qiang could be afraid.

It was impossible.

Or perhaps...

"Brother Qiang, what's wrong? Are you alright?" Lao Guai asked, his face full of worry.

At this moment, Lao Guai even wondered if his older brother, Chen Qiang, had suddenly gone mad.

"Answer me, just now, that policeman, did Chen Xu ask you about a fallen policeman?"

Chen Qiang took a deep breath and continued to ask in a low voice.

Lao Guai, completely unaware of the problem, nodded and said, "Brother Qiang, it's nothing, right? After all, he was a fallen policeman. By the way, Xu only contacted the fallen policeman's family. There might have been some conflict, but he's already fallen, there shouldn't be any problems afterward. I also investigated that girl; she's just an ordinary high school student, from the same school as Xu. Don't worry, I'll handle any problems." Lao Guai smiled broadly.



Chapter 564 A Cataclysmic Disaster: That Beastly Son Ruined Me!


After all.

Chen Xu was practically someone Old Guai had watched grow up, from his infancy to his current independent self. While he possessed a ruthless side, those who achieve great things, while not necessarily the most ruthless, must at least be ruthless at heart.

At least, Old Guai knew that Chen Qiang, though often full of heroic spirit, was ruthless beyond compare. His "One Blade of Yunhai" days had never cooled his blood; he was decisive and ruthless.

This wasn't a major problem. Besides, before taking action, Chen Xu would usually investigate who his opponent was. If they were powerful figures, or if he felt he was going to cause serious trouble, he would generally avoid provoking them.

This proved that Chen Xu was intelligent.

Moreover, he could handle the company's business. It must be said that Huayu Group's business situation was truly different from other companies.

Although the publicly disclosed assets were only a few billion, that only accounted for about 20% of Huayu Group's total business.

In other words, how did Chen Xu, at such a young age and still a minor, manage to control a company worth billions? He commanded the fear of everyone under his command.

Anyone who dared to provoke him met a tragic end. Therefore, no one dared to challenge Chen Xu's bottom line, and the company's development flourished.

In other words, while the improvement wasn't huge, it was at least an improvement.

Being able to lead a multi-billion dollar company while still a minor meant that Chen Qiang had a successor, and the future of Huayu Group was assured. So, in a way, this wasn't a bad thing, but rather a good thing.

But now…

“What do you know? Any more questions? Since you investigated, didn't you investigate the network of connections of that girl's deceased father?”

Chen Qiang's eyes flashed with malice.

A family wipeout.

That's right.

Now, there's a growing consensus in Yunhai that being targeted by Jiang Tian truly means the annihilation of one's entire family.

Of course, these criminal groups weren't actually that afraid. After various investigations and assessments, they discovered that Jiang Tian wasn't just recklessly conducting investigations.

On the contrary, Jiang Tian's investigations were primarily conducted on individuals who had offended him for various reasons.

In other words, they were asking for trouble by provoking someone, and then, being both incompetent and prone to playing games, they were completely wiped out – in other words, they deserved it.

These people finally realized this.

Alright.

If we can't afford to offend him, can't we at least avoid him?

Now, very few people are willing to provoke him. After all, the downfall of the Blood Hand Group, once extremely famous in Yunhai, was still vivid in their minds.

And now...

"Brother Qiang, the main issue is that policeman who died. He seemed to be from the anti-drug system. You know how it is with the anti-drug system; we haven't infiltrated very deeply, so we haven't been able to uncover many things. But according to my investigation, even though he was a captain, he shouldn't have much influence after his death, right?" Old Guai said, frowning.

Yes.

Normally, even a captain wouldn't be a threat to them.

After all, not to mention the people Qiang Ge contacted, even Lao Guai's connections and influence far exceeded that.

Of course, due to the strictness of the anti-drug system, infiltration within it is actually very difficult.

Because this has always been a key focus of investigation and a constant target of surveillance.

However, regardless of the circumstances, the captain wasn't really taken seriously by him.

But now.

"Heh, Yu Wei, so, haven't you considered who's in the anti-drug system?" Qiang Ge's cold voice gradually emerged.

The anti-drug system?

Lao Guai was stunned, but then he realized.

Qiang Ge, who had just harbored some wishful thinking, felt his head spin instantly upon hearing "anti-drug system."

It's all there, completely all there.

Jiang Tian's former anti-drug leader, the one who had just sacrificed himself.

An only daughter.

Being bullied.

That killer star is enraged.

"Jiang Tian?" Old Guai asked tentatively.

Qiang Ge's hands trembled; his fists clenched so tightly that the veins bulged.

It's over.

Completely over.

That's right.

This wasn't just once or twice, nor was it just one or two incidents. Jiang Tian's record, his reputation, and his intimidating power were earned through countless killings.

In their eyes, Jiang Tian was completely different from other police officers. He didn't follow the rules, he didn't have those tedious procedures, and he didn't spend months tracking down leads. Once they received information, he easily dealt with it, found a few scapegoats, and that was it.

Jiang Tian, ​​this killing star, didn't give you any nonsense.

Because from the beginning, in every case, Jiang Tian didn't give you any time. In fact, once Jiang Tian started operating, many criminal groups were wiped out without any prior warning.

That's Jiang Tian's characteristic.

There was absolutely no prior warning or warning before the move, but once it happened, it was like a thunderbolt.

"Brother Qiang, do you mean the girl Ah Xu is investigating is the daughter of that old leader Jiang Tian, ​​or the old leader who was killed in the line of duty?" Old Guai asked, stunned.

Chen Qiang didn't speak.

"I'll call Ah Xu right now and tell him to release the girl. Jiang Tian can't possibly go to such lengths over something like this," Old Guai tried to salvage the situation.

"Call that beast right now! I don't care what he's doing. Even if he has to kneel before that girl and beg for her forgiveness, if he doesn't get it, I'll personally take care of him. I told you long ago, we can't let this beast get away with this. Sooner or later he'd cause a huge disaster, and now look what's happened!" Chen Qiang slammed his fist on the table.

Because it was only four words, but those four words were a devastating blow to him.

For Jiang Tian, ​​it was just a matter of rage, mobilizing troops and searching everywhere.

But for the Huayu Group, being targeted by others was nothing compared to Jiang Tian.

No other force could stop them!

Jiang Tian makes his move, giving them absolutely no chance to maneuver.

And at this moment…

When Lao Guai dialed the number,

at this very moment,

in Chen Xu's usual criminal hideout, Chen Xu was already grinning maliciously.



Chapter 565 There's always a reason why someone is pitiful.


At this moment, Chen Xu was truly satisfied. Looking at Guo Na's terrified face and her bewildered expression, everything filled him with a deep sense of fulfillment.

Or perhaps, there was another reason.

Because his biological mother died when he was young, and the "One-Knife of Yunhai" gang hadn't yet risen to prominence, Chen Xu lived with relatives and grew up constantly at the mercy of others.

Perhaps this is why Chen Xu developed an extremely low self-esteem and sensitive nature from childhood. He was incredibly sensitive to everything around him; even the slightest unintentional action from someone could be a huge blow to his psyche.

For example, Guo Na simply pretended not to see him and ignored him, but in Chen Xu's sensitive eyes, this was interpreted as disrespect.

Of course.

If Guo Na were someone with power and connections, then it wouldn't matter. Although Chen Xu felt insulted, he was also shrewd enough to know who he could and couldn't afford to offend.

Guo Na's actions, coupled with the investigation revealing she was just a lowly police officer whose father had even sacrificed his life, were met with such disrespect.

Chen Xu couldn't tolerate this. He immediately decided to retaliate, not only to get revenge but to make Guo Na hate him and regret her actions.

Although Guo Na didn't do anything at the time, at that moment, a single look in Chen Xu's eyes, so sensitive, conveyed:

that she looked down on him.

People with this mentality are often those who suffered misfortune or tragedy in their childhood, resulting in such a state. In other words, they are pitiful children with extreme low self-esteem.

However, some pitiful children with unhappy childhoods find satisfaction in self-harm, while others find it in harming others. Unfortunately, initially, Chen Xu found satisfaction in self-harm, but later, after Yunhai Yibadao rose to power, he found satisfaction in harming others.

Furthermore, perhaps Chen Xu truly is a genius. With his ruthless methods, he has indeed managed to completely control the school leaders within the company.

"That's right. According to the current investigation, Chen Xu's mental illness stems from an unhappy childhood. Ultimately, he's a pitiful child. His childhood misfortune led to his mental illness, and because his father, Yun Hai, was busy building his empire, he couldn't care for him, leaving him to live with relatives and endure countless humiliations." Song Liguo shook his head, clicking his tongue with slight regret.

Perhaps it was a pity that such a talented young man had gone astray. If he had followed the right path, he might have become a pillar of society, contributing to the nation and its people.

But now, it's a pity he's become a scourge on society.

It seems somewhat regrettable and regrettable.

Don't underestimate Chen Xu. He's still a minor, yet he's already managing a company with assets worth billions, back in 2003, although at that time, it was only a part of the Huayu Group.

Or rather, this is only the visible part; the core business of Huayu Group is still the gray and black industries.

Of course, this might also be because Chen Qiang didn't want his son to get involved, leaving him a way out. These criminal gang leaders like to leave their families a clean path, allowing them to operate their visible businesses cleanly, so that investigations wouldn't even show any connection to the gray and black industries.

Take Miss Yun, for example. The Yun family is such a large and terrifying criminal organization, a huge scourge on society, practically the ringleader. Countless amounts of drugs produced annually come from the Yun family; they are among the top families in neighboring Myanmar.

But what happens? All the criminal operations are handled by Miss Yun, while Miss Yun is portrayed as innocent and naive. To this day, Miss Yun hasn't been apprehended, and arresting Miss Yun would be pointless.

The person hadn't committed any crimes whatsoever; arresting them would have been pointless, and they'd have to be released in the end.

But it's a pity.

Chen Qiang's plan was sound; he wanted to ensure his son's safety, so that even if he himself were exposed, his son would escape punishment.

However, he eventually discovered that it wasn't that simple.

Especially Chen Xu, whose crimes were utterly heinous.

By the time Chen Qiang realized this, it was too late; Chen Xu had already committed countless atrocities.

"I won't say that every pitiful person has a hateful side, but Chen Xu simply deserves to die. According to the investigation, Chen Xu has harmed countless young girls, using various methods, even harming their families. Most of these girls dared not speak out. Especially Chen Xu, if the investigation is correct, he deserves to die; being executed a hundred times would be enough." Jiang Tian's gaze was cold.

That's right.

After learning what had happened at school, and knowing who was behind it, Jiang Tian had a clear target. There's a saying: never try to defy the state apparatus, because that's suicidal.

Like Chen Qiang, who rose to such a high position, the key factor was his shrewd choices. He used all sorts of methods, even recklessly, spending countless sums of money to contact and cultivate relationships with certain wavering leaders within the system.

Ultimately, he gained influence in both the legal and illegal worlds.

His success was also due to never intending to defy the state apparatus; almost everything he did was within ethical boundaries.

Most of his activities were in the gray market, though some were in the black market, but he understood that defying the state apparatus was a dead end.

As for Jiang Tian, ​​it's no exaggeration to say that

the power he can now mobilize is far beyond what others can imagine. Don't be fooled by the hostility many feel towards Jiang Tian; those who are hostile are simply those who have shady dealings and weak resolve, fearing that one day Jiang Tian's sword will fall on their heads.

But equally, for those with unwavering will...

They treated Jiang Tian like a son, no, even closer than a son. They were almost always there to help, or rather, to grant any request.

Relatively speaking, the leaders protecting Jiang Tian could actually reach the capital.

After all, throughout history, only Jiang Tian had achieved such accomplishments.



Chapter 566 The catastrophe was self-inflicted.


“You’re right, but I can only investigate part of it right now. You have security connections; if you wanted to investigate, I reckon you could find out how many times Chen Xu urinates a day.” Song Liguo said with a wry smile.

It has to be said.

Compared to security's authority, their authority in drug enforcement is somewhat insufficient, or rather, when it comes to investigations, they can’t even come close.

In short, if security wants to investigate any information, they can find out everything within ten minutes.

“Actually, it’s not as outrageous as you think. Security is indeed more detailed.” Jiang Tian held the document in his hand, expressionless.

This document contained all the illegal and criminal records of Chen Qiang and Chen Xu.

“Actually, while it’s not common knowledge that Huayu Group is involved in organized crime, quite a few people know about it. I want to know, why hasn’t any action been taken against Huayu Group all this time?” Jiang Tian’s eyes flashed.

This was a big question.

If everything has to wait for the capital to take notice and investigate, then what's the point of having Yunhai here?

Jiang Tian had heard of the Huayu Group more than once.

Including the Huayu Group's involvement in organized crime; it's rumored that the Huayu Group has many henchmen and thugs.

The shady businesses they're involved in are countless.

There's a saying that goes, "If Chen Qiang stomps his foot, the entire Yunhai will tremble."

While this statement sounds exaggerated, it shows just how influential this guy is.

"Captain Song, oh no, I should call you Director Song now. You could pretend you didn't see this before because it wasn't your problem. Although your job performance wasn't great, it's not entirely your fault. However, as the deputy director, you can't handle these matters the same way as before. This would be extremely damaging to the entire Yunhai. Besides, according to the intelligence I have, Huayu Group is also involved in terrifying drug crimes. That guy called Lao Guai, working for Chen Qiang, I heard he controls half of Yunhai's underworld's gray-area businesses."

Jiang Tian shook his head, interrupting Song Liguo.

That's right.

In fact, the saying "when one person attains enlightenment, even their chickens and dogs ascend to heaven" is quite accurate.

According to their past lives, if things followed their historical trajectory, both Jiang Peng and Song Liguo would have been dismissed by now. Although it seemed like Song Liguo was implicated by Jiang Peng, the real reason was a reasonable punishment from above for their inaction.

At least if Jiang Tian were in charge, he wouldn't tolerate them either.

Don't say you're powerless to change things and can only go along with it. The saying goes, "In governing, one should strive for order." If you can't change the overall situation, you should still act within your own authority.

But Jiang Peng and Song Liguo, without exception, just went along with it. In other words, if they couldn't do it, they wouldn't do it. Even though it affects everything, we can't avoid provoking them just because they're powerful. Otherwise, we wouldn't live up to the trust the country has placed in us and the organization's expectations.

This is a betrayal of the country.

"Sigh, we understand what you're saying. I'll change in the future. I'll humbly accept all your opinions, okay? But you also need to consider our capabilities. Not everyone can be as twisted as you!" Song Liguo said with a wry smile. Did they really think everyone was like this freak?

That's why, in all these years, Yunhai has only produced one Jiang Tian.

The others are just sitting around doing nothing. It's not that they don't want to do something; for example, there were two previous bureau chiefs who wanted to get things done, but they both died due to various accidents.

Everyone knows the real reason, but do they dare to say it? They don't dare to say it, and they certainly don't dare to provoke them, fearing that those criminal groups will hold a grudge. The consequences of retaliation would be unimaginable.

But Jiang Tian?

When faced with criminal groups that dare to retaliate, look at what Jiang Tian does.

He goes straight to their doorstep. "You dare retaliate against my family? I dare to forcibly take you all down, one gun each, and kill you all."

The downfall of the Blood Hand Group, though costing them lives, taught everyone a lesson.

That lesson was that Jiang Tian was truly not to be trifled with.

Of course, we can't rule out the possibility of some reckless madmen willing to risk everything to defy Jiang Tian.

"The situation in Yunhai is still too chaotic. We need to thoroughly clean it up from top to bottom, especially regarding these kinds of criminal gangs. They are absolutely not allowed to exist in Yunhai," Jiang Tian stated succinctly.

These black and gray industries, especially, require top-down management.

Entertainment venues, in particular, are where the three scourges of prostitution, gambling, and drugs are most prevalent and severely affected.

“That Black Wolf, the one you got rid of, was actually one of Chen Qiang's henchmen from the start. These criminal gangs are incredibly complex; one wrong move can have far-reaching consequences, especially with the Huayu Group. Once they get involved, as far as I know, it'll be a completely different scale than before. You need to be prepared. I'm a little worried about whether Yunhai can handle this kind of shock.”

“Of course, not everyone involved is actually connected to the Huayu Group. You have to understand, many shady businesses and entertainment venues, to some extent, represent the prosperity of a city, especially in stimulating massive consumption, so…”

Song Liguo spoke slowly.

Governing a large country is like cooking a small fish—that's the essence of it.

Not only countries, but cities are the same. That's why politics is a process of compromise, seeking progress through mutual compromise.

“So tolerating the existence of such forces is, in my opinion, inaction.”

“The existence of criminal gangs is a huge harm to both society and the economic environment; it's entirely more harmful than beneficial,” Jiang Tian interrupted directly.

Song Liguo's lips twitched, and he finally sighed softly.

He was well aware of these things, but it's important to know one's own limitations. Jiang Tian could act so recklessly because he had powerful backers.

Not to mention anything else.

Just today, with a single phone call from Jiang Tian, ​​all the resources of the entire city, the entire provincial capital, were mobilized because of his word.

If Song Liguo wanted to do something, it would not only require approval from the provincial department and headquarters, but also be overseen by Shen Han.

Of course, this is only the first hurdle. The most important part is what follows: it needs to be decided through layers of meetings at the city and provincial levels. Only after the meeting decisions are approved will headquarters begin to take action.

By the time they start to act, it's too late.

But all of this was resolved with just one sentence from Jiang Tian. That's the difference.

"Team Leader Jiang, we have cleared and surrounded the scene, awaiting further orders."



Chapter 567 The debt of gratitude for raising a child is greater than the heavens.


Inside the criminal hideout, Chen Xu was completely unaware of what was happening outside. Seeing Guo Na's terrified expression filled his extremely sensitive heart with a strange sense of satisfaction.

It was a pleasure, a pleasure that filled his body and soul.

"Now you still think someone can save you? I confessed my feelings to you, what are you?" Chen Xu sneered.

It has to be said that Chen Xu was truly enjoying himself. Perhaps it was because of the repressed past he had endured; after all, one has to bow one's head under someone else's roof, even though he had taken revenge on the poor relatives who had adopted him.

Even though they hadn't done anything wrong back then, to the sensitive Chen Xu, they were utterly wicked.

"Ah, that feels good."

At this moment, Chen Xu clearly needed to do something to arouse himself.

Initially, Chen Qiang also thought his son was a genius, but later he realized, and gradually discovered, that this "genius" son had truly gone completely astray.

He'd gone completely awry, inside and out, but at this point, it was clear changing things was impossible.

So what if he'd gone awry? What else could she do? After all, he was her own son.

At that moment, Chen Xu took a deep drag on the white powder, even placing some in front of Guo Na.

"I heard your father's a policeman, apparently in drug enforcement. If there's a spirit in the afterlife, knowing his daughter's been hooked on this stuff, what do you think his reaction would be?" Chen Xu said slowly.

These words instantly filled Guo Na with terror and utter confusion.

Especially when she saw what Chen Xu was holding, she trembled all over: "No, don't come any closer! Get away! Don't come near me!"

At that moment, the fear within Guo Na was surging wildly.

Her whole body was trembling.

Because she simply couldn't imagine what the consequences would be if she became addicted to this stuff.

A life worse than death?

To be alive, a living corpse, even though one is already dead.

The thought was unbearable.

Guo Na thought of her father, seeing the hatred in these people's eyes. If she were infected with this, how could she face her father even after death?

"Hahahaha..." Chen Xu laughed loudly, feeling a surge of pleasure at the sight of their fear.

Serves her right.

Yes, she absolutely deserved it.

Serves you right for daring to look down on me.

What Guo Na did was a simple, instinctive reaction, but in Chen Xu's eyes, it was incredibly serious.

"Don't come any closer! Don't come any closer!" Guo Na desperately tried to back away.

Chen Xu twisted his neck: "Grab her."

As he spoke, Chen Xu took another drag. It must be said that while Chen Xu was undeniably a genius, he was completely twisted, inside and out.

Or rather, he already suffered from a severe mental illness.

"Don't worry, big brother." The two henchmen approached Guo Na, already used to this kind of thing.

They also knew how terrifying the destructive power of this thing was.

It's safe to say that once you encounter it, there's no escaping it for the rest of your life.

However, just then, as Chen Xu approached with the item, his phone suddenly rang.

Chen Xu frowned slightly. He was deeply engrossed in this, and no matter who it was or what happened, he absolutely wouldn't allow anyone to interrupt him.

This was probably the most interesting thing he'd ever done.

But even though he didn't want to answer, the phone kept ringing, which made Chen Xu, who was in the middle of his intense activity, completely impatient.

His face hardened with murderous intent.

Being interrupted at this moment was worse than death for him.

He angrily pulled out his phone, intending to turn it off immediately, deal with this, and then vent his anger on the caller.

But.

Just as he was about to turn it off...

Upon seeing the contact name...

Chen Xu lowered his hand from the phone.

That's right.

He had originally said...

Even if it were Chen Qiang's biological father calling, Chen Xu wouldn't answer or pay any attention at a time like this.

But this call was from Lao Guai.

Who is Lao Guai?

Although his biological father, Chen Qiang, gave him life, the person who raised him was the one he felt the deepest gratitude for, the one with whom he shared the deepest affection—someone who was more than a father figure to him.

From childhood, perhaps due to his genius, or perhaps because he was too intelligent, he could almost clearly sense everyone's attitude towards him—their dislike, their anger, and so on.

For example, the family he stayed with. Although they seemed to treat him well, and others spoke highly of him, how could outsiders know the cold treatment he received at home?

That dislike, that way they hid the good food from him, deeply wounded Chen Xu's fragile self-esteem.

Therefore, when he had the ability to retaliate, he would do so without any scruples, ruthlessly taking revenge, leaving them to suffer in regret.

But that's human nature. At least, the other party had never abused Chen Xu.

Chen Xu, however, repaid kindness with enmity.

He didn't realize that without this family, Chen Xu might not have survived.

Of course.

Later, because of Lao Guai.

And Lao Guai truly loved Chen Xu from the bottom of his heart. He genuinely tolerated everything Chen Xu did, even when he caused trouble, no matter what he did, Lao Guai would almost always clean up after him.

Perhaps it was precisely because of Lao Guai's indulgence that Chen Xu became increasingly bold, and his actions became increasingly perverse.

To satisfy his perverse desires, he was capable of almost anything.

"Godfather, what is it?" Perhaps because of his overwhelming gratitude towards Lao Guai, Chen Xu's anger gradually subsided at this moment.

Even speaking calmly, Chen Xu spoke with composure.

Perhaps only when facing this godfather.

Yes, his godfather.

If it weren't for Chen Qiang's sake, Chen Xu would have wanted to acknowledge Lao Guai as his biological father, because Lao Guai was the closest person to him.

In his eyes, Lao Guai was the most qualified father; Chen Qiang was merely someone who raised him.

The debt of gratitude for raising someone is greater than heaven.

That's right.

Chen Xu's gaze was deep and unfathomable.

However, the gentle voice he expected from Lao Guai didn't come out.

Because in the past, no matter how much trouble he caused, Lao Guai would always calmly tell him, "It's okay."

"Don't ask anything.

I'll take care of everything."

Over the years, Chen Xu had long since become accustomed to this.

But today, Lao Guai was clearly completely different from usual.

"Did you...kidnap a little girl?" Lao Guai asked.

Chen Qiang originally wanted to make a phone call directly, but Lao Guai interrupted him. Clearly, no one understood Chen Xu better than Lao Guai.

At this moment, forcing a response, saying the sky was falling, would only provoke Chen Xu's rebellious nature.

In the end, it might even cause everything to spiral out of control.



Chapter 568 You're dead meat, the Killer Star is coming to shoot you.


"Yes, Godfather, didn't I just ask you to investigate? It's about the only daughter of a police officer who died in the line of duty. What's wrong, Godfather? Is it a bit troublesome?"

Chen Xu paused slightly, then continued, "But I trust you, Godfather. This is a small matter; I'm sure you can handle it easily."

In Chen Xu's view, this was just another small matter, one his godfather could easily resolve. Besides, if his godfather couldn't handle it, surely his biological father could? He had his biological father behind him.

Although he didn't want to get involved with his biological father in many things.

"You've gotten into trouble, do you know that?" Old Guai asked tentatively.

It has to be said.

Old Guai had no sons of his own, and after Chen Qiang entrusted his son, Chen Xu, to Old Guai, Old Guai truly doted on him, treating him like a precious treasure.

He loved him to this extent, like his own son.

But now...

He's gotten into trouble.

Everything had been manageable before, but now it was unmanageable.

At this moment, Lao Guai couldn't help but recall something Chen Qiang had said before: "You can manage now because you haven't caused any trouble."

But what will they do when they mess with someone they can't afford to offend?

But at that time...

Lao Guai didn't think that would happen, because Chen Xu was always very meticulous. He would never provoke anyone with status or connections, or anyone who would cause trouble.

But unfortunately...

Today, it seemed Chen Xu had caused a major disaster.

He was about to face a major catastrophe.

Only now did he suddenly remember what Chen Qiang had said before.

It seemed things couldn't be contained any longer.

This matter was like the sky falling for them.

They might as well have just found someone with connections; things wouldn't have come to this.

"Godfather, don't worry, I know what I'm doing. I won't kill anyone. I know my limits. I'm just playing around. Godfather, I know those limits." Chen Xu thought Old Guai was trying to dissuade him as before after he'd gotten into trouble.

However, Chen Xu clearly knew what was going on.

He understood what he could and couldn't do.

Even if someone did die, Chen Xu would never reveal his hand. Every detail would be handled flawlessly, leaving no room for future problems.

That's why he'd managed to get by for so many years.

Nothing had happened all these years. What trouble could a sacrificed young policewoman's daughter possibly cause? Didn't she understand that death extinguishes all evil?

Besides, Chen Xu didn't believe Yunhai's power posed much of a threat to him.

After all,

Yunhai's police system has always been renowned nationwide.

"You've caused trouble, do you know that?" After a moment of silence, Lao Guai spoke.

At this moment, he couldn't be hasty; Lao Guai was still trying to remain calm.

But it was clear that while Lao Guai could remain calm, Chen Qiang, sitting opposite him, had completely exploded.

This unfilial son.

This beast.

This time, they're doomed!

So many years, they've finally made it this far.

They're finished, you know?

Over the years, he had painstakingly built up such a large power base.

But now?

Just because of this rebellious son, to satisfy his own desires.

Now he's caused trouble, and he's still saying those things.

The more Chen Qiang listened, the more his anger boiled over.

So, he didn't give Lao Guai a chance to speak.

While Chen Xu was stunned, his mind replaying Lao Guai's words,

trouble? How did he cause trouble?

What kind of trouble is this?

He was still thinking, could Lao Guai really not handle such a small matter?

The next moment.

A thunderous shout suddenly rang out.

"Beast, rebellious son, what have you done?" Chen Qiang roared furiously.

"What have I done?"

Chen Qiang was startled, but the next moment, hearing this voice, Chen Xu was also enraged.

That's right.

It's happening again.

It's always the same; he either beats or verbally abuses him.

Every time he sees Chen Qiang, he's either verbally abusing or physically assaulting him.

The reason the father and son have almost reached this point is because Chen Qiang is too fond of solving problems with his fists. Whenever there's a problem, the first thing he does is beat his son.

Nothing else matters; he just wants to beat this unruly son first.

Over time,

Chen Xu slowly developed a rebellious streak.

"What did I do wrong? What trouble did I cause? I was just disciplining a classmate, why am I in trouble?" This time, Chen Xu chose to fight back head-on.

This almost made Chen Qiang, who was already roaring in anger, choke on his breath.

He nearly choked to death.

"You unfilial son, you unfilial son, ah, you unfilial son, you beast, I'm going to beat you to death!" Chen Qiang roared, his voice almost cracking.

"Come on, kill me! Go ahead and kill me! If you can't, you're my son!" Chen Xu was also burning with rage.

Especially hearing those words, he completely exploded.

He exploded from the inside out.

Before, Chen Xu was meek and submissive, but now, he couldn't tolerate it anymore.

Why?

This person who only gave birth to him but never raised him beat him on sight.

"What right do you have to be my father? Besides beating me, what else have you done to me? What right do you have to hit me?" Chen Xu roared again.

Besides beating him, is that all he can do?

"Fine, fine, fine, you've rebelled, completely rebelled! You beast, you unfilial son, I'm going to kill you!" Chen Qiang's eyes were bloodshot.

Now.

He was going to kill this son now.

What use was such a beastly son?

There are rules in the underworld.

It could be said that Chen Qiang was capable of making it big.

It's because Chen Qiang has rules, and he especially adheres to the rules of the underworld.

You could say Chen Qiang is involved in organized crime, with countless shady businesses.

However,

for Chen Qiang, he's only after money, and he's very much bound by the rules of the underworld. No one would be so heartless as to commit such heinous acts just to satisfy their inner desires.

But quickly, Chen Qiang suppressed his anger and said, "Chen Xu, let me tell you, I'm not your father, and we have absolutely no relationship anymore. Don't call me father. I don't have a son like you. Of course, you're not going to live to see this day anyway."

"You've gotten yourself into big trouble, you know? No one can save you. Do you know who's after you? Jiang Tian. Jiang Tian is going to kill you now."



Chapter 569 It's all fate, it's all retribution


Ultimately, it was still his son. At this moment, thinking of Jiang Tian's methods, Chen Qiang inevitably felt worried about his son.

Of course, worry aside,

Chen Xu's confrontation with him had enraged Chen Qiang, making him wish he were dead. But, this was, after all, his own son!

Sometimes, Chen Qiang wondered if he had committed too many evil deeds in his life, and this was retribution for him. Otherwise, why, after his first wife died, did he marry a new wife, only to have a daughter?

He had so many women, yet only one daughter remained.

However,

Chen Qiang thought of his daughter and sighed inwardly.

This daughter was no pushover either.

Or perhaps, he didn't know if it was because he had committed too many sins that his son had gone astray, and gone further and further astray. His once talented son had become a beast, a heartless beast.

He treated him like an enemy.

As for his daughter, she was no less so.

However, unlike Chen Xu, her daughter was far too upright. She looked down on Chen Qiang, even disdaining him, severing ties with him as soon as she came of age, and bluntly stating that she didn't have a gangster father.

She was too independent, even getting into police academy.

In short, they hadn't seen each other for a long time.

Both her son and daughter were like this.

Chen Qiang couldn't help but sigh. Perhaps this son and daughter were sent by heaven to punish him.

Even with only this one son, he still couldn't turn a blind eye.

“Killer Star, Jiang Tian?”

“Dad, what does he do?”

Chen Xu raised an eyebrow, unable to contain his curiosity.

This was definitely his father exaggerating.

"It's always been like this, and it's still the same now. They're definitely trying to scare him on purpose. That's right, it's happened before, and this time they even got their godfather, Lao Guai, involved."

"Captain of the Yunhai Narcotics Enforcement Team, the girl you're after just losing her father was her former superior. That 'killer star' has his eye on you now. I want you to kneel down and apologize right now," Chen Qiang said in a deep voice.

"Dad, are you crazy? Just a narcotics enforcement captain, and you're this scared? If you can't handle it, let my godfather take care of it. This so-called 'killer star' will be obedient then." Chen Xu's smile was mocking.

A narcotics enforcement captain.

With such a small background, he can't even hold his own.

Is this a joke?

In the past, Chen Xu didn't even care about a narcotics enforcement captain, or even a more powerful force, because he had gradually discovered the extent of his father's power—he could easily control both the legal and illegal worlds.

How could such a small matter be so easily overlooked?

Especially making him kneel down and apologize.

Heh.....

"Do you think I'm joking? Let me tell you, your only way out now is to kneel down and beg that girl for forgiveness. Otherwise, let me tell you, in that killer's hands, you're almost certainly dead. He might even have found you somewhere and could kill you immediately. Even if he doesn't kill you, you'll suffer a fate worse than death."

Chen Qiang had never underestimated the power of the state apparatus, because he clearly understood how terrifying it was.

No force could contend with the state apparatus. Chen Qiang understood that his survival was due to his constant caution and avoidance of crossing any lines.

Once the state apparatus got serious and started operating, someone like him, despite his vast wealth and power, would be nothing more than a mantis trying to stop a chariot.

As Chen Xu listened to the voice on the phone, his mocking smile gradually froze.

This didn't sound like a joke.

It wasn't a lie. Chen Xu was very perceptive and could sense whether someone was being lied to or not. And this was clearly not a lie.

He looked so serious.

This wasn't a joke at all.

"I know you look down on that anti-drug captain. Let me tell you, he's no ordinary anti-drug captain. Do you know how the Wenye Group was destroyed? Let me tell you, it was that killer who single-handedly brought it down. Our assets may surpass the Wenye Group, but in terms of social influence, no matter how big you are, can you be as influential as the Wenye Group, which affects hundreds of thousands of people? Our black market, even if it's destroyed, won't have much of an impact. You're going to kill me, you know that?"

Chen Qiang cursed.

He was completely enraged.

Chen Xu's expression also froze. He didn't know Jiang Tian, ​​but how could he not know the level of the Wenye Group?

Perhaps in terms of assets, they were involved in too many gray-market industries, so the real economy wasn't as affected.

Besides, even if they controlled nearly half of the nightclubs and entertainment venues, these were just entertainment projects, and had nothing to do with people's livelihoods.

The profits, though terrifying...

Their assets are also greater than those of the Wenye Group.

However, in terms of social influence, they are completely incomparable; they are not even in the same league.

If the Wenye Group could be easily destroyed, what chance would their Huayu Group have?

“Dad, you’re not joking, are you? You’re not just trying to scare me, are you?” Chen Xu’s face was somewhat pale.

“Scare you? Why would I scare you? Let me tell you, do you know who the recipient of the Special Merit Award was recently reported to be? It’s this Killer Star, the captain who reaches the highest levels of government. Do you think we can afford to offend him? Besides, let me tell you, although the specific details of how this Special Merit Award was awarded haven’t been reported, I’ve managed to find out a bit. Some time before this Special Merit Award was awarded, the Tucha gang in neighboring Myanmar suffered a devastating blow. Hundreds of drug lords were wiped out, and countless people were killed or wounded. This case was 100% done by this Killer Star. Only in this way can he deserve the Special Merit Award.”

Chen Qiang’s influence is considerable, and he is well aware of many recent events.

He knew even more how terrifying Jiang Tian was.

The more you know, the more afraid and terrified you become.

Chen Qiang was like that; the more he knew, the more terrified he became.

Chen Xu, however, was stunned.

Completely stunned.

His entire body went cold.

He knew his father hadn't lied to him, and had no reason to.

Sure enough, the next moment, Lao Guai's voice came through the phone: "Xu, do as your father says now. Your only way out is to beg that girl for forgiveness and insist it was just a joke, a deliberate attempt to scare her. Otherwise, no one can save you. Do as I say quickly, or it will be too late. I'm on my way there right now; I hope I can make it in time." Lao Guai spoke urgently.



Chapter 570 This is someone you can't afford to offend in your lifetime.


Chen Xu's mind went blank for a second.

If he was only 70-80% certain before, after Lao Guai's words, it was 90% certain.

Being targeted by someone with a Special Merit Award, this terrifying figure who made history—was there any chance of survival?

Turning his head, Chen Xu looked at Guo Na, who sat on the ground, her face filled with terror.

Her face was deathly pale with fear.

He never dreamed that the seemingly ordinary girl he'd casually messed with would have such a terrifying background.

What to do?

What should he do?

He thought, "If I kill this little girl and find a place to dispose of the body,

I can then deny any involvement. Even if people find out and Meng Qian exposes the news, it doesn't matter. As long as I don't admit it, and I pull some strings—those people who took so much money from me should do their part—it'll probably just be a false alarm."

After all,

"Even if you're a killer, without solid evidence, what can you do to me?"

Just as Chen Qiang was about to kill her, Old Guai, who had watched him grow up, seemed to instantly guess his thoughts.

"Also, don't be so clever as to think about disposing of the body. This killer is far more terrifying than you can imagine. You could say that even without solid evidence, once you dispose of the body, he can make you wish you were dead. Even if it's just a frame-up, he can still take your life. He's not one to follow the rules!" Old Guai continued to warn.

Chen Xu felt a chill run through his body; goosebumps instantly rose all over his skin.

Just now, he had indeed...

had that thought.

But now.

Even Old Guai said that.

No one knew better than Chen Xu what that meant. This was the first time he had ever heard Old Guai's voice so serious and somewhat frightened.

Because all along, no matter how much trouble Chen Xu caused, Old Guai would calmly say, "Don't worry, don't ask anything, leave everything to me."

And then, sure enough, all those troubles disappeared, completely gone.

But now.

"Godfather, is there no other way?" Chen Xu's voice trembled.

"No, now you can only get that girl to forgive you. Now, I order you, kneel down and apologize immediately. Now, right now, if it's too late, it will truly be too late!" Old Guai's voice was nearing its breaking point.

Especially, at the end, he completely erupted into a roar.

This sudden realization sent a shiver down Chen Xu's spine: "Godfather, don't be agitated, don't be angry, I'll kneel down right now."

As he spoke, Chen Xu's legs buckled, and he knelt on the ground. Chen Xu wasn't stupid; he was the kind of person who could be both firm and yielding, facing powerful forces or opponents with strong backgrounds.

Chen Xu could cower instantly.

Because he clearly understood that offending those he couldn't afford to offend would ultimately bring misfortune upon them.

But despite all his calculations, he hadn't anticipated, much less realized, that this seemingly simple girl, who could uncover all the information in a minute, actually had such a deep connection with Jiang Tian.

His composure crumbled.

Chen Xu's composure crumbled.

It was as if...

Just as things were getting serious, at the last minute, he was kicked under the bed, and to make matters worse, someone showed up and finished him off.

Of course, this is just a metaphor.

But the anger in Chen Xu's heart couldn't be extinguished.

He even gritted his teeth, thinking about how to get revenge. Of course, this was just a thought hidden deep within his heart.

He would only seek revenge if he had a sure chance.

If he didn't have the opportunity, he wouldn't act. He clearly understood that as long as he was alive, he could always fight again.

Once he was wiped out like the Wenye Group,

he, as the heir of Huayu, would be nothing!

Without a powerful backer, he was nothing at all.

Thump!!!

Chen Xu acted almost without hesitation, even though his mind was almost twisted at this moment.

His teeth were almost bleeding from biting them.

Chen Xu finally managed to speak, his voice hoarse, "I'm sorry, please forgive me, Guo Na, I was just joking with you. Please forgive me."

As he spoke, a dark glint flashed in Chen Xu's eyes. If he ever had the chance, he would make Guo Na wish she were dead, provided he was even more careful than this time, and didn't leak a single word.

Chen Xu's sudden kneeling startled Guo Na.

Guo Na had just been in despair.

She was already thinking about how to end her life.

Even in death, Guo Na absolutely refused to be humiliated and toyed with by such a beast.

But, on the other hand, Guo Na was also thinking, if she died so inexplicably, would Brother Jiang know who the murderer was?

Should she leave a breath, to leave some information for Brother Jiang, to find out who had harmed her?

No, Jiang Ning could.

Jiang Ning knew who had called her away, so if they couldn't find her, they would likely trace it back to Meng Qian.

Then, this group would be doomed.

After the past few days of observation, in her mind, Jiang Tian had gradually become omnipotent.

But just as Guo Na was looking around, contemplating how to end her life,

suddenly, Chen Xu knelt down in a shocking act, completely stunning Guo Na.

She stared at Chen Xu, dumbfounded.

What was he doing?

What was he going to do?

Was he going to play some kind of game?

A perverted game.

"I'm sorry, please forgive me."

"I'm sorry."

"Guo Na, please forgive me. I was just joking with you."

"Really."

"Now I realize my mistake, really, I completely know I was wrong."

Chen Xu kowtowed repeatedly, weeping and apologizing profusely.

This scene even stunned the henchmen around him.

The next moment.

*Slap!*

Chen Xu suddenly jumped out, then raised his hand and slapped his underling across the face with incredible force.

A loud slap echoed throughout the room, followed by Chen Xu's furious roar: "What are you standing there for? Untie Guo Na! Damn it, who told you to tie Guo Na up? I just wanted to play around with her. You've gone too far!"

After speaking,

Chen Xu frantically raised his foot and delivered a vicious kick to his underling's stomach, sending him flying several meters.

It was a truly lethal blow.

Guo Na, after being untied, watched Chen Xu's performance with cold eyes.

Not only was she unmoved, but a faint sneer even lingered in her heart.

Such an exaggerated performance.

There were only two possibilities, which she had already guessed.

Either, he wanted to play an even more inhuman game, giving her hope only to crush her in despair.

Or...

The phone call just now was the most likely explanation—someone had intervened.

And someone Chen Xu couldn't afford to offend.



Chapter 571 The Spiritual Leader of the Yunhai Gangsters


“Based on observation, that young girl, Guo Na, is not in danger. Besides, there's a sniper watching her; nothing unexpected will happen. But now, why not just take them out? Given your personality, you wouldn't tolerate something like this, would you?”

At that moment, a police car was still driving on the road. Song Liguo looked at Jiang Tian with some curiosity. As Song Liguo spoke, Song Qiuwan, who was nervously driving in the front, turned her head slightly, her eyes filled with curiosity, to look at Jiang Tian.

Recently, Song Qiuwan had been reflecting on herself, ultimately only letting out a soft sigh. Sometimes, once a rift appears, it's hard to mend. Relationships between people are like a pane of glass; once broken, how can you put it back together?

That's how it was between Song Qiuwan and Jiang Tian.

The key issue wasn't that Song Qiuwan didn't listen to Jiang Tian, ​​but rather that she lacked trust in him. In other words, it was a crisis of trust between them.

Especially recently, Jiang Tian's relationship with Song Qiuwan has been entirely that of superior and subordinate, including their mission execution. In fact, Jiang Tian's approach differs significantly from other leaders.

Many dangerous missions, such as intelligence gathering and infiltration, are almost entirely handled by Jiang Tian himself.

The rest of the time, they simply wait for the others to make their move and close the net.

At this point, all she needs to do is follow Jiang Tian and reap the rewards. What, still not satisfied? Well, Jiang Tian takes all the risks himself in handling these major cases.

He bears all the danger himself.

The rest depends on your own performance. Even if you don't perform well, you'll still have some collective credit as a safety net; if you perform well, individual credit isn't too difficult to achieve.

While a first-class merit is impossible while following Jiang Tian, ​​and a second-class merit is also very difficult, a third-class merit is still quite possible.

How could you not be satisfied with that?

What more could you want?

Look at others, going undercover and engaging in all sorts of dangerous things. After years of undercover work, they might only get a second-class merit award at best.

In other words, Jiang Tian understands the situation in Yunhai, and he understands how terrifying and rampant the criminal groups and forces there are. They're truly capable of anything and dare to do anything.

Taking the initiative would be very risky, but Jiang Tian has his own special abilities, so he's not afraid.

But what about others? If they get too high-profile and are targeted by criminal groups, not only are they in danger, but their families are also at risk.

Jiang Tian takes all the risks himself. Sometimes, he even secretly follows his mother and sister, Jiang Xiaoyu, on their way to and from work, scanning their surroundings with a radar to make sure no criminals are watching them.

Now, Jiang Tian has a thorough understanding of these criminal gangs.

In fact, he does take action against some, but he takes care of others conveniently.

Right now, there are just too many cases, and Jiang Tian doesn't have time to deal with them all. But once he does, he'll take care of everything at once. Right now, there are just too many things to do and not enough time.

In short, Jiang Tian and his family are currently in extreme danger.

While Jiang Tian has gained a great deal, the risks and dangers he bears are terrifying.

One wrong move could lead to lifelong regret.

It's only because he's in this situation; anyone else would likely have died countless times over.

While Jiang Tian doesn't consider himself a towering figure, ensuring the safety of his subordinates under his protection within his power is something he enjoys doing.

Otherwise, what's the point of having so much power?

How can you protect the safety of the masses if you can't even protect those around you?

"Uncle Song, of course, I want to see who might step forward. If the intelligence is correct, this Chen Xu has a godfather called Lao Guai, right? He's elusive and unpredictable," Jiang Tian said quietly.

The power of the state apparatus is terrifying.

If an investigation were conducted seriously, it's safe to say there's almost nothing that can't be uncovered. The authority of narcotics enforcement is already terrifying, but compared to security, it's on a completely different level.

This is truly an unlimited level of authority, including unlimited firing power.

As for carrying firearms, that's actually the lowest level of authority within this category. Even narcotics officers have the right to carry firearms when not on duty, but the supervision is extremely strict, and the regulations for firing are also extremely stringent.

Security personnel, on the other hand, have a much more lenient authority.

Just recently, Jiang Tian had already found the phone number Chen Xu made and retrieved the call content.

That's right.

The call between Lao Guai and Chen Xu was wiretapped.

As for how they did it, it's the same old story: the power of the state apparatus is unimaginable to ordinary people.

And who Lao Guai is is even simpler.

Perhaps Lao Guai is someone hidden in the shadows, involved in gray and black markets, including being Chen Qiang's black glove, etc.

His identity is kept somewhat secret.

But investigating wasn't difficult at all.

"Old Guai is the black glove of Huayu Group's gray-market operations, specializing in helping Chen Qiang with shady dealings. The crimes he's committed are countless, and the number of lives on his hands over the years is innumerable," Jiang Tian explained.

"He really is Uncle Song!"

Jiang Tian sighed softly. Song Liguo's abilities were decent, but only about on par with Jiang Peng—not particularly outstanding. His advantage was his rich experience.

Of course, it might also be because Uncle Song and Jiang Peng were comrades-in-arms who transitioned to civilian life together. They were both upright, and while those around them used various means to rise through the ranks, they maintained their principles.

They didn't cross the line, which is the most commendable quality.

However, in terms of ability, they were ultimately lacking, just mediocre. Of course, this might indeed be because of this, coupled with the surrounding environment, that they became somewhat complacent, allowing them to survive until now.

Otherwise, if they were too capable, they would probably have been killed by those criminal groups through various unexpected means long ago.

"You mean Lao Guai will come to rescue Chen Xu?" Song Liguo asked, his eyes lighting up.

Song Liguo wasn't very familiar with Lao Guai.

However, the Huayu Group was a household name, especially its most famous member, Chen Qiang, who, while not the absolute boss of Yunhai, was certainly a prominent figure in the underworld.

Even after achieving great success, and no matter how low-key Chen Qiang became, it didn't stop him from being a role model for many gangsters in Yunhai.



Chapter 572: He was moved to tears upon seeing Officer Jiang; a first glimpse of the truth.


Huayu Group is a well-known name in Yunhai, openly controlling the Yunhai Guoban Nightclub and owning countless other businesses.

In particular, there's a bar in Yunhai called Southeast Road.

It's considered Yunhai's most famous, even arguably the most popular and energetic bar in the Southeast region.

It's extremely famous throughout the entire Southeast region.

Southeast Road alone contributes taxes to Yunhai annually comparable to that of a listed company.

No, it even contributes more taxes than a listed company.

And this doesn't even include tax evasion and tax reductions.

This Southeast Road property belongs to Chen Qiang's Huayu Group, which also owns other businesses.

Almost all of them are highly profitable.

For example, there's a private hospital.

This hospital is very popular with wealthy people in the Southeast region. For example, parts replacements—things that are unavailable at regular hospitals—are readily available at this private hospital; if you have money, you can get anything you want.

And what is the source of all this?

It's chilling to think about.

It's fair to say that while the Huayu Group isn't the top-ranking company in Yunhai,

it's undoubtedly the wealthiest company in the entire Yunhai area, bar none. Most importantly, all of its businesses are highly profitable.

Moreover, it falls into a gray area, somewhere between black and gray.

Take nightclubs, for example. When people are partying wildly, their deepest desires are completely unleashed, making them most vulnerable to crime.

Especially prostitution, gambling, and drugs—these are indispensable elements of nightclubs. In this era, without these things, there can be no truly legitimate nightclubs.

"Therefore, legitimate nightclubs can't operate like this, especially private hospitals. Although they hire many famous doctors at high salaries, without the necessary components, it's like a skilled cook trying to cook without rice. The source is obvious without investigation: using these to amass wealth recklessly."

Jiang Tian shook his head as he spoke. The scale of Huayu Group was terrifying.

Its overall assets were no less than those of Wenye Group.

“We know all this, but unfortunately, while we've known that Huayu Group is involved in organized crime, we haven't had sufficient evidence. Besides, Huayu Group contributes a significant amount to Yunhai's GDP every year; you have to understand Yunhai's difficulties. On the other hand, Chen Qiang is very cunning and rarely reveals his weaknesses. He's a cunning old fox. Without sufficient evidence, taking action rashly would be difficult to justify to society.”

Even if everyone knows the truth.

Even if you know, I know, everyone knows, without evidence, you might be able to use confessions for questioning, interrogation, and detention. But against someone like Chen Qiang, such methods are useless; he has an entire legal team at his disposal.

If handled poorly, without sufficient evidence, it could easily become a social media sensation, and then we'd be in a difficult situation.

We can't fabricate evidence; if it comes out, no one can bear the consequences.
