Unless there's a huge benefit involved.

Otherwise...

Loyalty?

Loyalty is worthless!

Without benefit, see who betrays you the fastest. That's right, your own brothers. Outside, it's all about brotherhood, about risking your life for each other.

But once you're in here, these same brothers can implicate three brothers in a single sentence, every word revolving around brothers.

"You're not lying to me, are you?" Li Tian was starting to panic.

After all...

"Damn it."

That's a bit too much.

How could Li Tian not panic? He took the blame because he wanted a bright future, but execution, the death penalty—good heavens, his future was gone! What future was left?

If he didn't confess now, when would he?

"What do you think? We can lie to you? Can the law lie to you? Besides, let me tell you, don't be delusional, thinking the consequences won't be a problem. Let me tell you, that's a joke. Do you know how terrible the consequences of your actions are? You could be executed a hundred times over. And if I could lie to you, who are the people behind me? It's the minister and Chief Gao. Would they lie to you, or try to trick you into confessing? Don't be ridiculous. Two high-ranking leaders wouldn't lie to you, would they? After all, you're not the only one in this group who knows; there must be others. Do you think we need to do this?"

Jiang Tian asked slowly.

"Stop talking, I'll confess." Li Tian instantly broke down.

Ultimately, he was just a young man with a strong sense of purpose.

How could he possibly withstand such pressure?

“Someone gave me money, a lot of money, and promised even more after it was done,” Li Tian confessed immediately.

“Who gave you the money?” Jiang Tian pressed.

In terms of psychology, these interrogation experts were no match for Jiang Tian. He perfectly controlled when to use which method, every word hitting the other party's weakness.

In fact, this was because he could see that the other party was emotionally fragile and easily broken. For those with strong will, Jiang Tian had other methods, and with his now ridiculously discerning eye, he could roughly guess their true nature.

However, that was more tiring than this simple method.

For those with even stronger will, he had previously simply given up on interrogating them; there was no need to waste time, since he couldn't extract anything anyway.

“My older brother,” Li Tian replied.



Chapter 596 Fangshi Pharmaceuticals? The involvement is getting more and more extensive.


"Who is your older brother?" Jiang Tian pressed.

Li Tian was shivering uncontrollably, trembling. "Fang, Fang, Brother Fang."

When he uttered those two words, Li Tian seemed to lose all strength. His eyes glazed over, devoid of any spirit. Those two words meant he had betrayed his older brother.

But after confessing, Li Tian seemed completely relieved.

"Who is this so-called Brother Fang? What does he do? Why did he make you do this?" Jiang Tian pressed.

Jiang Tian knew about the influence of the red circle, even more so, he knew that the two lawyers had used resources to get on the Yu City news channel.

These were the lawyers' doing; Jiang Tian knew all about it.

In fact, he knew even more.

The subsequent online and offline escalation, the ability to impact the Municipal Public Security Bureau in such a short time, was something these two so-called red circle lawyers couldn't possibly have accomplished.

The red circle's influence couldn't reach the waters of Yunhai.

As for Li Tian, ​​he had already confessed, and now he was determined to go all the way. He was even afraid of Fang Ge's retaliation, and now, more than anyone else, he wanted Fang Ge to die with him.

Because...

If Fang Ge didn't die...

His future...

He might face an even more miserable future, perhaps tortured to the point of wishing for death.

“Fang Ge is a pharmaceutical representative in Yunhai.”

“A pharmaceutical representative?” Jiang Tian was astonished.

How did this involve pharmaceutical representatives? And pharmaceutical representatives shouldn't have anything to do with Jiang Tian's profession. Jiang Tian was certain he had no conflict with any so-called pharmaceutical representatives. It might be more like gangsters, but this was too far off.

How could gangsters be involved with pharmaceutical representatives?

Moreover...

This Li Tian was clearly a gangster.

Who was Fang Ge?

“Pharmaceutical representative? What do you mean? What’s Fang Ge’s name?” Jiang Tian asked, his eyes narrowing.

After all...

Jiang Tian clearly understood that there were only two types of people who could target him: those with whom he had past conflicts, and those with whom he currently had conflicts.

This Brother Fang either had a past grudge against him.

But a pharmaceutical representative was clearly unrelated to his profession.

The other type...

"Those with current or future conflicts can only be one type: either they're blocking my way, or they're afraid and want to get rid of me."

Jiang Tian smiled faintly.

Someone was afraid.

"I don't know their specific name, but I know they own a pharmaceutical company and are also a pharmaceutical representative. They have many companies under their umbrella and substantial assets," Li Tian explained.

"How did they contact you?" Jiang Tian asked.

Li Tian didn't hide anything: "They didn't just contact us. To be precise, I contacted my subordinates. After Brother Fang contacted our group, he gave us a lot of money to contact online trolls, and also to contact offline people and hire others."

These things could easily be uncovered through interrogation of others; they couldn't possibly be a secret.

Those people were indeed paid by Li Tian.

"You're incredibly audacious, you don't even realize the consequences," Jiang Tian clicked his tongue in amazement.

This is terrible.

So naive, so incredibly naive.

However, that Brother Fang seems to be somewhat naive.

"I heard that Brother Fang has assets worth billions and is one of the richest people in Yunhai. He even took us to visit his company."

Li Tian continued speaking.

"Is it that simple?"

Jiang Tian frowned slightly.

Suddenly, he felt that this matter wasn't as simple as it seemed on the surface.

Based on Jiang Tian's past experience handling cases,

it's generally very difficult to investigate the person behind such matters.

"No, actually, Brother Fang was quite wary. He only brought me along because he saw my loyalty. And it wasn't Brother Fang himself who met with me; it was his assistant. No one else was present," Li Tian quickly explained.

Jiang Tian suddenly understood.

However,

did the other party really think that by not showing himself, he could truly render them helpless?

Or...

did they really believe that such a simple method would leave them with no way to deal with them? If they thought that way, they were being too naive.

"Anything else?" Jiang Tian inquired further.

Li Tian paused, thought carefully, and nodded, saying, "That Brother Fang never showed up from beginning to end. In fact, it was his assistant who handled everything. But I can testify to that."

"I don't need your testimony. I mean, do you have anything else to say?"

"What's Brother Fang's name?"

Jiang Tian inquired further.

"Although I don't know the name 'Brother Fang' and haven't seen it before, I guess it's related to Fang Ziliu, who's quite famous on TV."

"Fang Ziliu?"

Jiang Tian's expression froze. It wasn't that he hadn't thought of the name, but rather that the name itself was very familiar to him.

Jiang Tian was extremely familiar with it.

Yunhai had a large conglomerate.

The most famous part of it was its pharmaceutical group.

Its products, such as Wujiu Cold Medicine, were almost all bestsellers nationwide, contributing a staggering amount of tax revenue to Yunhai.

It made a huge contribution to Yunhai every year.

Therefore, Jiang Tian was stunned.

This Fang Ziliu was no ordinary person in Yunhai either.

Because he had made considerable contributions, even donating to many schools and engaging in numerous charitable activities,

actually, this person was quite similar to the case Jiang Tian had handled before.

Both were philanthropists.

But this made Jiang Tian's mood somber.

It's ruined.

This further illustrates that Yunhai is utterly corrupt.

Even these seemingly respectable philanthropists are now falling from grace one after another.

So what's next?

Jiang Tian frowned. Are there any clean people left in Yunhai?

"That's right, it's him, Fang Ziliu. I don't know about the others, but I feel that this Fang Ziliu is almost certainly him, because that pharmaceutical company is Fangshi Pharmaceuticals," Li Tian continued.

Jiang Tian's brows furrowed even more.

Because...

Actually, there's another issue.

This Fangshi Pharmaceutical Company, even in later years, before Jiang Tian's transmigration, hadn't collapsed.

Fang Ziliu even led Fangshi Pharmaceutical Company out of Yunnan Province and into the whole country, almost making it a golden brand.



Chapter 597 Firmly Set Xiao Jiang at the Core


What truly astonished Jiang Tian was that, even in later generations, Fangshi Pharmaceuticals, Fangshi Group, and Fang Ziliu as a whole continued to grow stronger, eventually reaching their peak.

But now, it seemed that Fang Ziliu was no ordinary person.

"Brother Fang, are you sure?" Jiang Tian asked.

"Probably, no, I'm pretty sure, it's Fangshi Pharmaceuticals. Everyone calls him Brother Fang. Although he hasn't shown up in person, it's definitely him."

Li Tian said quickly.

His tone was very certain.

"What proof do you have?" Jiang Tian asked.

“Yes, because I’m always cautious, I left behind a recording device. This recording device is from Fang Ziliu’s assistant, recording what he said to me.”

Li Tian nodded, then revealed the location of the recording device. Jiang Tian also called Zhao Wei and instructed him to locate the recording device.

Soon, in less than half an hour, Zhao Wei arrived quickly.

After listening to the conversation, the room fell almost completely silent.

Only scattered sounds from the recording could be heard.

“Did you see the news online?”

“No.”

“Now I’ll show you. This is the person, in the Yunhai City Public Security Bureau, named Jiang Tian. But you have to pretend you don’t know anything about him. I’ll give you 50,000 yuan now, and another 50,000 yuan after it’s done. You organize people to protest at the City Public Security Bureau. You don’t need to do anything else, just put pressure on those leaders. After it’s done, I’ll give you another 50,000 yuan.”

"Okay, okay, I understand."

Yes, the voice in the background is Li Tian's, and there's an unfamiliar voice inside.

Although secretly recorded audio is often not accepted as direct evidence by the court, if its authenticity can be proven and the content is indeed related to the case, especially if submitted by the prosecutor's office, it can be sufficient as decisive evidence.

The conversation here is very clear.

"So, the person behind this probably just wanted Li Tian to find someone to put pressure on them, and didn't intend to storm the Municipal Public Security Bureau." Minister Tan suddenly realized.

After all...

Storming the Municipal Public Security Bureau is completely different from protesting. These two types of events are handled completely differently. If these people aren't causing trouble or doing anything else, but just standing there protesting...

In this case, direct suppression wouldn't be justified, since they haven't done anything wrong, and protesting is quite normal.

But the mistake was that Li Tian was too eager to show off. He only had a score of 100, but he wanted to get 200.

In fact, Li Tian is quite clever.

If there weren't any high-ranking leaders present,

the city leaders in Yunhai might have managed to resolve the situation by downplaying the issue.

But things are different now.

A high-ranking leader is present.

Of course, this is evident from Han Xian's handling of the situation.

“We can’t rule out the possibility that Li Tian’s backer orchestrated this. After all, too many people want to get rid of me. The bigger the commotion, the more likely comrades like Han Xian, who are very hostile towards me, will stand up and speak on their behalf,” Jiang Tian said quietly.

Looking at it more deeply, it’s not as simple as it seems on the surface.

Of course, none of that matters.

“Should we launch a manhunt for them?” Minister Tan frowned.

At this moment, after reviewing the scale of the Fangshi Group, Minister Tan also frowned deeply. He had been able to make a decisive move earlier because it was just a small disturbance involving less than a hundred people, easily resolved.

But now…

You must know that the Huayu Group is also under investigation, and Chen Qiang of the Huayu Group is under surveillance and could be arrested at any time.

However, the immediate action wasn’t taken because they wanted to first consolidate Chen Liting’s influence within the Huayu Group, facilitating a smooth transition and making the Huayu Group a backup plan that the police had planted in the underworld.

With Huayu Group involved, the police would be fully aware of every move in the underworld. They could even arrest or eliminate anyone they wanted without a trace.

And what about the sheer size and terrifying scale of crime in Yunhai?

This is a huge achievement, an immense achievement, like a giant pie.

Otherwise, Chief Gao's presence here, partly to protect Jiang Tian, ​​and partly to reform Yunhai, would be a crucial reason.

The terrifying achievements involved might truly eliminate future threats to Yunhai, and Chief Gao's further advancement wouldn't be impossible.

This is an immense, terrifying achievement.

Although the waters are deep, the greater the risk, the greater the reward; the bigger the storm, the more valuable the fish. This applies not only to the underworld but also to them.

Coming to Yunhai carries certain risks; for example, in his previous life, Chief Gao sacrificed himself shortly after arriving in Yunhai to save Jiang Tian.

But now, with Jiang Tian and Chief Gao working together,

they are unstoppable.

They are invincible.

This has resulted in a string of great achievements, though most of the credit goes to Jiang Tian.

But has Chief Gao not contributed? Of course not. After all, Chief Gao strongly supported Jiang Tian and is his staunch backer.

“Little Jiang, do you have any suggestions?” Chief Gao asked Jiang Tian.

He was also seeking Jiang Tian's opinion, given Jiang Tian's recent performance, which had been almost omnipotent.

“From an economic and social stability perspective, Fangshi Pharmaceuticals actually has a higher level of influence than Wenye Group. As the leading pharmaceutical group in Yunnan Province, its influence is formidable. Any action against it would have a significant impact on the economic environment of Yunhai, even causing fear among many large companies,” Jiang Tian analyzed.

That's right.

The Wenye Group is gone, and now they're targeting the Huayu Group. If they were to follow up with a move against Fangshi Pharmaceutical at this time, the resulting chaos would be continuous.

Moreover, the consequences are unimaginable. It might trigger fear within the group, and the impact on the investment environment would be extremely detrimental.

A swift and decisive action isn't the way to go. It would leave everyone vulnerable. After all, which large corporation doesn't have its share of unsavory dealings? And the rise of any wealth inevitably involves bloodshed that cannot be exposed.

Even if action is necessary, it absolutely cannot be done all at once.

"So, should we hold off for now?" Minister Tan inquired.

Jiang Tian's opinion is crucial.

In truth, given Jiang Tian's circumstances, unless the Wenye Group itself commits treason, he wouldn't rashly take action against those groups unless he has solid evidence.

Moreover, even with solid evidence, Jiang Tian has no right to decide whether or not to take action unless the issue is particularly unforgivable. This requires meetings and discussions at the city and sometimes even provincial levels, as it concerns the development of the entire city.



Chapter 598 A young girl's feelings are always poetic, as deep as the sea.


In a context where those who get rich first help those who get rich later,

if Yunhai were to be upgraded to a directly administered municipality, becoming like Donghai and Beijing, and fully develop into the economic center of Southeast China and the surrounding countries, absorbing the wealth of the entire Southeast,

it might very well become, or even surpass, cities like Hong Kong and Shanghai.

As for Jiang Tian's current position in Yunhai,

to some extent, his role has already transcended the simple function of drug enforcement. After all, drugs, prostitution, and gambling are inextricably linked, and so are the underworld.

Therefore, if we broaden his responsibilities, Jiang Tian's authority is actually quite extensive.

For example, right now, if Jiang Tian's opinions are reasonable in the eyes of the two leaders, they will definitely be adopted. And once these two bigwigs adopt them, there's no need for meetings between city and provincial leaders to discuss them. After all that discussion, it's too late.

Of course, this problem persists, but it cannot be changed, otherwise it might cause even greater chaos.

"No, no, no, Huayu Group's approach is quite good. While a swift and decisive action is better than the underground world, for a group with such immense influence, I suggest a more subtle and gradual approach. We should have people stake out and investigate covertly. Once Huayu Group is settled, we can then quietly take action against Fangshi Group."

Jiang Tian thought it over carefully. He couldn't afford a high-profile operation that would cause serious damage; he had to minimize the impact.

Of course, he didn't need to be overly cautious.

Because it's simple.

For capital, when profits exceed 100%, it's enough to make capital take crazy risks.

Right now, Yunhai's environment is such that there's a market, there's funding, and there's support. As long as you have an excellent product, you can make money. And if you can make money, even if you try to force these people to leave, they won't leave.

Conversely, if the economy declines, no matter how much you try to appease them, these people won't stay in Yunhai.

For example, in Jiang Tian's future life, when those companies saw Yunhai was doomed, they all ran away faster than rabbits.

These people aren't a major concern. As long as Yunhai has money, and can sustain that money, there's no need to worry about those things.

Of course, the impact still needs to be considered.

"Good, Xiao Jiang, you're right. Your opinion is very valuable. Let's take action directly. Leaving aside the evidence, this Fang Ziliu has considerable influence throughout Yun Province. He's a well-known pharmaceutical representative and a famous philanthropist. Rumor has it he donates to hundreds of primary schools in Yun Province every year."

Minister Tan nodded with satisfaction.

It has to be Xiao Jiang!

He's practically worry-free when it comes to getting things done. Anything can be handed over to Jiang Tian, ​​and Minister Tan doesn't need to worry at all. Jiang Tian will always solve it perfectly.

And he can accurately predict all possible outcomes.

Bold, meticulous, and most importantly, highly capable.

Such a person...

Minister Tan really wants to bring him to work by his side!

But Minister Tan knew this was impossible. Compared to his comfort zone, the grand stage of Yunhai was far more suitable for Jiang Tian's talents, and Jiang Tian had a brighter future ahead of him.

"That's right, but what about Chen Qiang? What are you planning to do?" Chief Gao asked.

That's right.

Fang Ziliu's situation is more troublesome.

But Chen Qiang's situation is simpler. After all, everyone knows he's a master thief in Yunhai. The only problem is, the police lack evidence, and he's too cautious, making it difficult to take action.

Everyone knows about Chen Qiang's criminal connections.

If they really take action, no one can say anything.

In fact, many companies might even applaud the arrest.

"I plan to talk to Chen Qiang about this," Jiang Tian said thoughtfully.

If Chen Qiang cooperates and allows Chen Liting to take over,

and Huayu Group is handed over to Chen Liting through Chen Qiang's hands,

that would be the most perfect transition.

"No, you want Chen Liting to take over the business from Chen Qiang, and Chen Qiang even wants to come back afterward?" After hearing Jiang Tian's idea, Chief Gao only had four words to say: "Wishful thinking."

Idiot.

That's right.

Unless Chen Qiang is an idiot.

How could that be possible?

He clearly knows this is a police conspiracy, and he knows the police are using Chen Liting to control Huayu Group, and after control, they want to arrest Chen Qiang.

Most importantly, Chen Qiang is essentially helping the Yunhai police arrest him.

Outrageous.

After hearing this idea, Chief Gao was astonished, only two words to describe it: outrageous, utterly outrageous!

"No, Chief Gao, you don't understand Chen Qiang. Others might not have much of a chance, but if I go..."

Jiang Tian stood up.

That's right.

Although he hadn't set off yet, based on Jiang Tian's analysis and understanding, he was already 90% certain, but he hadn't spoken yet to be conservative.

"Alright, Comrade Jiang, I trust you completely. I'll back you up no matter what. Just go ahead and do your job with confidence. If anything happens, come find me."

Minister Tan stood up and spoke directly to Jiang Tian.

He also made his promise.

Jiang Tian nodded slightly and left.

Now, regarding Huayu Group, Lao Guai and Chen Xu have been arrested.

In fact, Chen Qiang definitely knows.

Jiang Tian also knows that Chen Qiang has definitely received the news.

In the car.

Jiang Tian drove his Phaeton again. After Chen Liting got in, she looked at Jiang Tian with considerable surprise.

Unlike others, most people think that Volkswagen cars all look almost identical.

But...

Chen Liting is different. Chen Liting's family life is also different.

In fact, Chen Liting's family also owns a Phaeton, which is Chen Qiang's car for convenient, low-key travel.

"This car, it must be expensive, right?"

A strong fragrance wafted out as Chen Liting got into the car.

It has to be said that Chen Liting absolutely loathed Chen Xu, but no matter what, he was still her half-brother.

Chen Xu suffered quite a few beatings after entering the car.

These were all unspoken rules.

After all, what Chen Xu had done deserved to be torn to pieces.

Chen Liting felt a pang of sadness, yet also a sense of relief, as if a burden had been lifted.

She didn't know if she was doing the right thing, but she was upholding her sense of justice.

"I didn't realize Officer Jiang, you're quite wealthy," Chen Liting said, touching her bangs and pretending to look out the window. After all, being so close to her idol, Chen Liting couldn't resist and didn't dare look at him for long.



Chapter 599 The real controversy needs no further explanation.


"It's free."

Jiang Tian said with a faint smile.

He didn't say anything else. After all, the car really was free. Jiang Tian mostly used police cars for official business, but even when he wasn't using one, he rarely drove it. This particular car was, after all, a bit too conspicuous.

Especially when entering the police station, the leaders would recognize it. "Wow, you're just a lowly policeman, yet you drive a car better than mine, the mayor's car!"

"What do you mean?"

"Where did you get this car? What makes you qualified to drive it?"

Of course, while Jiang Tian wasn't afraid of any of that, he wasn't the type to be high-profile. In fact, he always preferred to be low-key in his personal life but high-profile in his work.

Let others say what they want.

"It's free, senior, you're not kidding, are you?" Chen Liting pouted in surprise.

The way she addressed him changed from "Officer Jiang" to "senior" without her realizing it, and their relationship had unknowingly grown much closer.

Jiang Tian glanced at Chen Liting, knowing full well what was going on, but said without saying a word, "After risking your life for so long and doing so much, isn't it only right that the organization reward me with a car?"

"Uh, it seems so."

Chen Liting scratched her head, finally realizing it might actually be true.

"Um, senior, where are we going now?" Chen Liting asked.

"Your home."

Jiang Tian answered simply.

"My home?"

Chen Liting didn't react for a moment, but quickly, she remembered that she was also a student at the police academy, though not yet graduated.

However, she had a basic understanding of many things, especially case-solving. In this serious situation, her brother had been arrested, but he was taking her home—what did that mean? Chen Liting already had a vague premonition.

"Liting, you're a good comrade, I admire you very much," Jiang Tian said slowly.

If Jiang Tian were in Chen Liting's shoes, without any special abilities and just an ordinary person, would he have assisted the police in eliminating his own family members, given his upbringing?

Jiang Tian considered the situation from Chen Liting's perspective. He realized he wasn't that great; in fact, such people were extremely rare, one in a million. Chen Liting, however, was precisely that kind of person.

She was single-mindedly devoted to a great cause.

She possessed an unwavering conviction.

“Senior, you…” Chen Liting lowered her head, her hands nervously kneading themselves.

Her mind was filled with Jiang Tian's words of praise. Praise from others wouldn't have affected Chen Liting much, but praise from her most admired idol instantly made her heart bloom with joy.

“Of course, Liting, you know your family situation yourself,” Jiang Tian said slowly.

Chen Liting's already bewildered hands became even more unsure of what to do.

"Senior, please, please let me explain. I didn't know anything about those things," Chen Liting said excitedly.

Jiang Tian quickly interjected, "I know, Comrade Liting, please don't be so agitated. I understand your stance very well, and I know you've done a lot quietly. However, there are many things in your family that you couldn't stop. You've also provided the organization with accurate intelligence on some crimes. We all understand that you're a very righteous and good comrade."

This wasn't just Jiang Tian making things up.

According to previous reports, Chen Liting had indeed provided some accurate intelligence related to certain crimes.

However, later, Chen Qiang, Chen Liting's biological father, after learning about his daughter's situation, or after his daughter directly confronted him,

Chen Qiang had no choice but to avoid the situation.

After all, she was his daughter, his most beloved daughter.

Compared to Chen Xu, who didn't grow up with Chen Qiang, Chen Liting, who grew up with him, clearly had a stronger bond.

Therefore, this was a key factor in the success of Jiang Tian's plan.

"Do you want the entire Huayu Group to be wiped out, or do you want to become a source of intelligence for the police and control the underworld's intelligence, with your own daughter in control?"

Given these two choices, Chen Qiang would undoubtedly choose the latter for his daughter's sake.

With Chen Qiang's cooperation, everything could be resolved.

"Is that so, senior? I'm not that noble. It's just that some things are too heinous. I wouldn't betray a traitor like my father. I just want to save some people," Chen Liting hurriedly explained, afraid of causing Jiang Tian to misunderstand.

But clearly...

Looking at the panicked Chen Liting, Jiang Tian knew that this girl was overthinking things again.

Her anxious and uncertain appearance truly pained Jiang Tian.

Did Chen Liting actually do anything wrong?

Was it wrong to insist on her controversial choice?

Obviously not.

Chen Liting wasn't saying that a traitor had betrayed her father.

True selflessness, focused solely on getting one's father imprisoned, is not about upholding one's own sense of justice, but rather a kind of justice devoid of even familial consideration. In reality, even superiors wouldn't dare to rely on such a person.

Because such a person could betray their leader at any time for the sake of justice.

If that were to happen, Jiang Tian would have to carefully scrutinize how to use Chen Liting.

Justice without flexibility is, to some extent, a distorted form of justice.

However, similarly,

If that were done, Chen Qiang's previous situation would definitely not be affected, but Chen Liting would be, or rather, Chen Qiang's mental state would collapse.

Fortunately, while upholding justice, he had also considered familial ties.

So, although he avoided it, sometimes Chen Qiang would even deliberately leak very small pieces of information to help Chen Liting gain favor.

Their relationship was still very, very deep.

"Justice without any room for maneuver is not correct, but similarly, justice that is too flexible is also not correct. Every form of justice has its own standard of measurement. Your standard is different from mine, and everyone's standard is different, but it's not a matter of right or wrong. Your persistence, at present, is a very correct form of justice."

Jiang Tian affirmed Chen Liting.

At that moment, Chen Liting's head felt like it was about to explode.

Completely exploded.

Her eyes widened, staring at Jiang Tian in disbelief, her face instantly turning bright red from the overwhelming excitement and boiling blood.

"Really, you...you really think so?"

Being affirmed, Chen Liting felt goosebumps erupt all over her body; countless layers of goosebumps burst forth on her snow-white skin.



Chapter 600 Taking Action, Huayu Group


After all, Chen Liting had doubted many times in the past whether her persistence was truly correct.

Because her persistence hadn't yielded any positive feedback, and no one had taught her what to do, or how to handle her situation.

Jiang Tian's affirmation, however, was like a shot of adrenaline, pointing her in the right direction.

"Now, it's time for you to dedicate yourself to the organization. The organization desperately needs you, so a very difficult task is assigned to you," Jiang Tian stated directly.

"What task?" Chen Liting asked hastily.

Needless to say, even facing mountains of knives and seas of fire, Chen Liting felt she might as well take the plunge.

"Become an undercover agent," Jiang Tian said slowly.

In truth, Jiang Tian had never been particularly fond of the undercover profession, or rather, of assigning undercover agents; in fact, he didn't have much affection for it.

Being an undercover agent was far too dangerous. Although the rewards were immense and the gains terrifying, every second was also excruciating torture for an undercover agent. They needed to uphold their righteous nature in the darkness.

However, this is unfair to the undercover agent, as they endure unbearable torment.

But equally,

the leadership greatly appreciates having undercover agents.

Now, Jiang Tian finally understands that the role of an undercover agent is often immense. The rewards—sacrificing one person for the gains—can save countless lives.

Therefore, the sacrifice of an undercover agent is worthwhile.

Moreover, it might even protect the undercover agent's safety.

Of course, comparatively speaking, Chen Liting's undercover work isn't really that of an undercover agent, because she's not doing dangerous things while working for her boss.

On the contrary, since she's the boss herself, her safety is guaranteed, and there's less danger and intrigue.

"Is it...are they going to do something to my father?" Chen Liting suddenly asked after a moment of silence.

After all, they were father and daughter. Chen Liting, who had grown up under Chen Qiang's care, couldn't possibly remain calm upon learning this news. He was, after all, her father!

She only wanted her father to reform.

"Actually, I know you did all this for your father, right?" Jiang Tian suddenly spoke.

Chen Liting froze instantly.

Her eyes widened in disbelief as she stared at Jiang Tian.

Or rather...

Jiang Tian wasn't just the only one who affirmed her, but also the one who understood her.

That's right.

Everything she did was for her father, for her own biological father!

“Actually, you’ve already seen it all. If you walk by the river long enough, you’re bound to get your shoes wet. A few years ago, such a large organized crime group in Northeast China was wiped out overnight by the state apparatus without any resistance. So, you’re afraid, you’re terrified that your father will one day fall to this state. That’s why you want to save your father, but you don’t know how. In the end, you can only choose to believe in your own path.”

Jiang Tian spoke calmly.

"When did you find out?" Chen Liting asked, incredulous, almost breathless.

"I knew the first time I saw you. I wasn't sure when I looked at the information, but after meeting you, I was certain."

That's right.

After seeing Chen Liting's information, Jiang Tian didn't understand much, but after meeting her in person, he knew.

"Is that so?" Chen Liting's face was filled with bitterness.

Yes.

That's indeed it.

Silence fell over the car, not a sound.

"Even so, you're still affirming me? Am I still righteous?" Chen Liting trembled.

"Judging by actions, not intentions, no one is perfect. Comrade Liting, whatever your inner thoughts, whatever you want to do, it's true that you're my fan, isn't it? It's true that you saved many people from your father's hands for Yunhai, isn't it? These are all things you did. You didn't do anything wrong. Why say you were wrong?" Jiang Tian's tone softened.

Jiang Tian was very willing to show his tender side to his comrades.

He might be swift and decisive when facing enemies.

But with his own people, Jiang Tian would never use the same attitude and methods he used on enemies.

Especially.

Chen Liting was also a pitiful girl.

Because this girl was right.

Or perhaps she was very prescient.

According to Jiang Tian's understanding from his previous life, in the future, although Yunhai would be completely economically backward, after the military took over, the situation in Yunhai would be as dire as it could get.

As for these gangsters, their fate was even more appalling.

The Huayu Group.

Their future ending was also tragic, utterly annihilated.

The crimes of the ringleaders, such as Chen Qiang and Chen Xu, were all exposed, and they were all sentenced to immediate execution without any leniency.

The sight of father and son going to the execution ground together was truly heartbreaking.

Of course, Chen Xu is still in the same situation now.

However, if Chen Qiang is willing to cooperate, considering his meritorious service and the sacrifice of his daughter, a life sentence wouldn't be a problem. With good behavior, he could be released in about twenty years, or even less.

Chen Qiang, who is not yet fifty, might not be able to see the world again in the future.

Returning to society in his sixties.

That might not be a bad ending.

And by then...

Chen Liting might have already officially returned to her police identity, and by then, she might already be in a high position of power, though I don't know what her job is.

That scenario would be infinitely better than Jiang Tian's ending before his rebirth.

"My dad isn't home; he should be at the company now," Chen Liting said silently, her head lowered.

Jiang Tian, ​​who was driving, didn't move his hands or change the direction of the car upon hearing this.

Chen Liting looked up at Jiang Tian.

But then she noticed, from the side, Jiang Tian's lips curved into a smile of extreme satisfaction.

Chen Liting looked out the window and realized that the car hadn't gone home at all, but was heading straight for the company.

It turned out that what had just happened was merely Jiang Tian testing the waters.

Regarding this test...

Jiang Tian was very satisfied.

Meanwhile,

The Huayu Group's office building.

That's right, the Huayu Group has a magnificent office building in Yunhai, standing tall beside the Yanjiang River.

At dusk, it's brightly lit and dazzling.

Its prestige rivals that of the most bustling areas in Donghai.



Chapter 601 Mr. Chen, it won't be like that for long.


Unlike the gentle slopes of Huangpu, the Yanjiang River is a turbulent, rushing torrent.

Huangpu boasts numerous ships, including cargo vessels, but Yanjiang lacks this advantage. To be precise, Yanjiang's situation is far too complex; the inability to accommodate merchant ships is a significant limitation. Otherwise, Yunhai's development might not be far behind Donghai's.

After all, in Yunhai, if crime is thoroughly controlled, and everything is under control, the wealth of the entire Southeast region can be rapidly concentrated there.

All of this hinges on Yunhai possessing what the wealthy of the Southeast region crave: firstly, stable residences; secondly, a vibrant, luxurious environment conducive to extravagance.

Thirdly, Yunhai needs places to attract their wealth, and currently, the real estate industry is a crucial pillar.

However, the development of the real estate industry also requires control over organized crime; in other words, the first condition is the most fundamental.

Of course, another limitation is the lack of Donghai's inclusiveness.

In Yunhai, the problem of mutual banding and the sheer number of local gangs makes things difficult to manage because it's hard to define their nature.

In other words, it's difficult to deal with them.

"Often, the more prosperous a place is, the more darkness it hides."

Jiang Tian looked at the skyscrapers. At this moment, many places around him were undergoing frantic development.

But unfortunately.

In his previous life, everything would gradually come to a standstill at this point. Then, a few years later, the current prosperity would be like a castle in the air, a desolate wasteland.

Unfinished projects were abandoned, businesses fled, and the current bright lights were only temporary.

Development is difficult.

But destroying a city is far too easy.

If the criminal elements in Yunhai hadn't completely spiraled out of control, becoming impossible to manage, things wouldn't be like this.

In the end, it all comes down to the problem of criminal elements.

And the Huayu Group's building was enormous.

Standing out prominently among these skyscrapers, Huayu Group indeed boasts its own headquarters building.

Actually, in my previous life...

Due to the rapid deterioration of the city's business environment, Huayu Group's importance was elevated once again. Unfortunately, it was later affected by the crackdown on organized crime.

This sole entertainment-oriented industry quickly withered away. In contrast, Fangshi Group rose rapidly, receiving support from almost the entire Yunnan province.

However, Jiang Tian never expected that the Fangshi Group, so famous in his previous life, was not so clean now, and even had far too many illicit businesses.

Or rather...

If you had been able to discard those things during their growth, no one would have held you accountable after they became successful.

But what you shouldn't have done, what you shouldn't have done, was continue these criminal activities at this time, after you had already developed.

Jiang Tian could tolerate a certain degree of leniency because he understood that a cat, black or white, is a good cat as long as it catches mice.

However, an excessively leniencying cat...

Yunhai didn't need that.

Besides...

Yunhai, having reached this stage, would rapidly expand once it became a directly administered municipality.

Under these circumstances...

There was no need for excessive indulgence, because national resources would also be mobilized to support it, transforming it into the most prosperous area in the entire Southeast region.

Soon...

Jiang Tian, ​​with Chen Liting, arrived at the reception desk.

The more shady the organization, the more it needed to maintain its image, especially for a company of Huayu Group's size and Chen Qiang's reputation. The office building couldn't be too shabby, so a huge investment was made to create an office building that was eye-catching throughout the entire commercial area.

Upon entering, the lights were bright and dazzling.

Especially when Jiang Tian brought Chen Liting to the reception desk, even the young woman at the reception desk was slightly taken aback for a moment.

Beautiful.

Very beautiful.

Jiang Tian couldn't help but click his tongue inwardly.

Sure enough, Chen Qiang is a man who cares a lot about his image!

Of course, dealing with such a powerful criminal organization, especially the massive Huayu Group, would naturally require a top-notch receptionist.

"Hello sir, who are you looking for?" Xu Rui's face showed a very friendly smile, but the smile seemed somewhat forced.

A young woman with a story.

Jiang Tian's psychological skills allowed him to see through her immediately, but despite his observation, he had no intention of prying into anyone's privacy.

Otherwise, with Jiang Tian's current psychological abilities, he could see too much; he couldn't possibly investigate everyone, could he? That would be a sign of mental illness.

"Chen Qiang." Jiang Tian was somewhat surprised, but still stated the name directly.

Mainly because this receptionist didn't recognize Chen Liting.

"What's going on here?"

"Your Huayu Group's darling daughter, and the receptionist doesn't even recognize her?"

"President Chen?"

Xu Rui was startled.

After all, she had never seen anyone address the boss by his first name so directly.

Actually, Jiang Tian didn't know that Xu Rui's visit was due to an accident. In fact, Jiang Tian's impression of her somewhat foolish eyes wasn't wrong.

This Xu Rui really was a recent college graduate.

Her first job ended because of an unexpected family incident; she took too much leave and was fired.

Her second job ended because the boss tried to sexually harass her; Xu Rui caused a scene, even getting the police involved, and was ultimately dismissed.

Her third job was this one, and so far, Xu Rui was quite satisfied. At least the company's boss didn't seem disrespectful to her; in fact, he was very polite.

They had met twice, and both had shown her great concern, which made Xu Rui, a pretty college student who seemed innocent but also a little naive, feel very satisfied. Most importantly, they had given her a significant raise.

If there was anything that displeased her, it was the company's young boss. They had met once, and he had been relentlessly pursuing her, which annoyed her greatly.

“That’s President Chen, President Chen of our Huayu Group. Please show some respect,” Xu Rui said angrily.

“He’s President Chen now, but he won’t be anymore soon,” Jiang Tian tapped the table, not in a hurry.

Jiang Tian didn’t have much to do right now, and mainly, he found this young girl somewhat adorably foolish, so he wanted to tease her.

At first glance, her demeanor seemed genuine, but as soon as he got to know her, Jiang Tian instantly saw through her.

She wasn’t like that at all.



Chapter 602 The End of a Hero's Life?


"What do you mean? Are you here to cause trouble?" Xu Rui took a step back warily, holding a walkie-talkie.

She looked at Jiang Tian with suspicion, assuming he was there to cause trouble.

"I'm not here to cause trouble. I'm telling the truth. If you don't believe me, just call your boss, Mr. Chen, and tell him Jiang Tian is here to talk to him. Tell him to set the table; I need to have a serious talk with him," Jiang Tian said directly.

"Okay, but if you're lying, you're in trouble. Let me tell you, our Mr. Chen is very fierce." Xu Rui didn't call security.

Companies run by criminal gangs like this usually have many ruthless security guards.

They can act immediately in case of any trouble.

But now...

Xu Rui saw that Jiang Tian was young and easily believed her.

So, Xu Rui cautiously took the landline and dialed Chen Qiang's number: "Mr. Chen."

At that moment, Chen Qiang was rubbing his head.

Since Chen Xu and Lao Guai were both arrested, Chen Qiang had been on tenterhooks, unable to stay put any longer.

After packing his things, Chen Qiang sat in his office, looking at the place he had been in for so long, feeling a sense of relief.

People like him usually prepared many escape routes, such as multiple passports.

Chen Qiang wanted to ensure that he knew the specifics of the situation immediately if anything happened, so he could make his escape as appropriate. He couldn't care less about anything else.

"Oh right, I almost forgot to tell the receptionist I wasn't here."

Chen Qiang suddenly stood up.

He just realized that he had been so focused on packing to escape that only the receptionist knew about his presence at the company. He should tell her he wasn't there, no matter who came.

That way, it wouldn't be seen as him being uncooperative.

Besides, he had some documents in his hand that he did need to go abroad to deal with.

Right now, a small helicopter was parked atop the office building.

These helicopters were convenient and very cheap.

They were practically free to buy, and many bosses liked using them.

Chen Qiang was restless and uneasy, so he decided to flee. Better to be safe than sorry.

Before fleeing, he needed to settle many things and transfer money.

Fortunately, he had prepared a considerable escape route.

Especially, he had a significant amount of money deposited in foreign banks.

Just as he was about to make a call,

the receptionist called.

"What is it?" Chen Qiang asked.

"Mr. Chen, someone wants to see you," Xu Rui said.

"Someone wants to see me? You forgot what I told you before?" Chen Qiang's heart skipped a beat.

Actually, when he arrived at the company, seeing the tense situation, Chen Qiang had already quietly asked that no one tell anyone he was there.

But she was just a naive, innocent college student.

So naive.

She simply believed Jiang Tian.

"But, it seems more important," Xu Rui explained.

There was also a hint of grievance.

Although he had given her a hint then, Chen Qiang hadn't said it directly.

Who could understand?

"Who saw me?" Chen Qiang put down his suitcase, waved his hand, and then had two loyal henchmen transport the suitcase to the helicopter.

"I don't know, I haven't seen them," Xu Rui explained.

"Haven't seen them? You..."

"Didn't you just say I wasn't here?"

Chen Qiang was getting angry.

He didn't have time to deal with those trivial matters now.

"No, they came up here looking for you, they must know you're here," Xu Rui quickly explained.

But the next moment, the phone in Xu Rui's hand was snatched away.

"Chen Qiang, don't even think about running away. Let me tell you, once you run, there will be no turning back. Now, immediately, wait for me in your office. Oh, and let me introduce myself, my name is Jiang Tian, ​​the captain of the anti-drug squad."

Jiang Tian's deep voice came through the phone.

(The phone's audio was transmitted.)

This made Jiang Tian's voice even deeper.

And even more intimidating.

But for Chen Qiang, his head buzzed, completely exploding.

He glanced at his two henchmen, who were already heading towards the rooftop.

Heading towards the rooftop, towards the helicopter.

Leave this place, leave Yunhai.

A voice kept echoing in Chen Qiang's mind.

But on the other hand,

Chen Qiang also understood: it was over.

Now it was all too late.

"Bastard, that bastard, that son of a bitch!" Chen Qiang angrily smashed all the fragile and valuable items in the office.

As for who he was cursing...

Who else could it be?

After Jiang Tian's voice rang out, it was too late.

If, when someone arrived, the receptionist Xu Rui had simply said he wasn't there, not at the company, Chen Qiang, knowing the news, could have quietly left by helicopter. At that time, helicopter control wasn't strict.

Many wealthy people like to own private jets.

Especially someone like Chen Qiang, how could he not have a backup plan?

But now...

The moment that stupid bastard Xu Rui called him,

Chen Qiang knew he was finished.

Going out on business and fleeing are two completely different things.

First, if he's already gone, where will they find him? They won't be able to find him, so it'll be even later.

Second...

This problem is even more troublesome and acute.

If he escaped...

Then, if they pursued him...

Even if Chen Qiang were to take a helicopter, he wouldn't be able to escape.

"Bastard, that bastard, I'm going to kill her!" Chen Qiang grabbed his hair.

Leaning against the office desk, his face was even more grim and uncertain.

But the moment the door opened...

Chen Qiang stiffly looked up and saw Jiang Tian standing before him.

At this moment, Jiang Tian's face was expressionless and still somewhat youthful.

Upon entering, his gaze first fell upon Chen Qiang.

Chen Qiang didn't know what kind of gaze that was. It was too murderous, too terrifyingly intimidating. Even with his decisive nature, he felt his heart pounding in the face of such a gaze. He stood there without saying a word, yet he felt a terrifying killing intent constantly emanating from him.

"Who are you?" Chen Qiang asked.

Jiang Tian didn't speak.

But at this moment...

Chen Qiang's daughter, Chen Liting, stepped forward: "Dad, don't make another mistake. Turn back. There's still a chance. Turn back."

Buzz!

Chen Qiang looked at his daughter.

His whole body trembled.

The end of a powerful figure.

A once-powerful figure.

But at this moment, he understood everything. It seemed, silently, so simply, that his life had ended, frozen in this moment.



Chapter 603 The Mysterious Special Merit Award: Its Origin


The moment Chen Qiang turned around and saw his daughter, he seemed to understand something. In that instant, a fleeting sense of relief appeared on his astonished face—yes, relief.

“We’re all smart people. You should understand that at this time, a large armed force should be surrounding your building. But I didn’t do that. I chose another way, bringing your daughter here. You should understand what that means,” Jiang Tian’s voice slowly rang out.

Then, Jiang Tian walked to Chen Qiang, sat down, and calmly looked at the ruthless figure who had dominated Yunhai his entire life.

That’s right.

Chen Qiang, in this Yunhai.

No.

Although Jiang Tian didn’t know much about Chen Qiang’s life from the police, one thing was certain: in Yunhai, there were countless self-made men.

And these people, those who rose from nothing, were not simple individuals; they could all be called ruthless figures. Among them, Chen Qiang had managed to stand out, managing to rise from nothing to where he was now.

In Chen Qiang's own words, the old man left him no property, only this body. With his own two hands, he single-handedly built the Huayu Group from scratch. Assets—actual assets, not just valuations—

but the wealth the Huayu Group itself possessed was already billions in cash.

In this era, billions.

What does that mean?

These billions are cash, not assets or real estate; it's purely the Huayu Group's own savings.

This concept is clear to everyone in this era.

"What do you mean?"

"No, you're playing dumb. You should understand what I mean. If I had really brought people here, would you have had any room to maneuver? No. But now, you have another choice."

Jiang Tian rested his chin on his hand.

Recruiting Chen Qiang as an undercover agent was impossible. Not only did Jiang Tian not believe it, but the police themselves didn't believe it either, and they certainly wouldn't choose Chen Qiang. Compared to Chen Qiang, there was a more obvious and superior option: Chen Liting.

Chen Liting was already grown up.

"Your daughter is twenty years old now, very outstanding, and the organization has high hopes for her," Jiang Tian changed the subject.

At this point, there was no need to beat around the bush.

Chen Qiang gave a bitter smile.

In the end, he said nothing, sat on the sofa, glanced at his daughter, and felt a pang of regret in his eyes.

If there was one thing he regretted most in his life, it was that Chen Liting wasn't a son, only a daughter, and a daughter, after all, couldn't carry on the family line.

Of course.

This was a widely held belief, a mindset that existed everywhere. On this land, nothing was more important than carrying on the family line, and a daughter was always someone else's child.

Of course, these thoughts only flashed through Chen Qiang's mind for a moment.

"Jiang Tian, ​​Officer Jiang, I admire you very much. To come here all alone."

Chen Qiang let out a deep breath; his last chance was gone.

Because...

If Xu Rui had managed to fool Jiang Tian down there, he could have easily left Yunhai with just a little delay. But that was impossible now.

Even getting on the helicopter was a challenge, let alone now, with the police likely already in control of the scene.

However, on the other hand, Chen Qiang was genuinely terrified.

Because a young man like Jiang Tian, ​​precisely because he was known, was all the more frightening.

Jiang Tian had a bright future; he didn't need to take any risks to rise smoothly to the top. Why would he risk everything alone, venturing into a den of wolves?

“Officer Jiang, can you answer one question for me? If you can, then I will cooperate with whatever you want to do.” Chen Qiang had calmed down.

Having fought in Yunhai for so long, for so many years, Chen Qiang's blood had long since turned cold. While luck played a part in his success, it was only a small part. The main factor wasn't morality, but ruthlessness.

Countless rivals and lives were lost at his hands.

Every step was built on the bones of countless others; it was no exaggeration. The fierce battles of the past had led him to this point, where he had retired in triumph as a powerful figure.

Chen Qiang had experienced far too much along the way.

“Of course, if I can answer your question, I will. But if I cannot, I hope you won’t waste your breath. You should understand that the choice now lies not with you, but with me,” Jiang Tian nodded calmly.

He maintained his composure and control of the conversation.

Looking at the young man before him, barely two years older than his son and daughter, who could still maintain such a commanding presence, Chen Qiang could clearly feel the pressure exerted by this man who had emerged from a sea of ​​corpses.

This man was terrifying.

Why wasn’t this man his son?

He had already reached this point, had transcended his social class—he had finally escaped it!

Now, one wrong move and everything was lost.

No, he hadn't lost yet, and he still had his daughter. Chen Qiang's face was filled with complex emotions.

However, Chen Qiang quickly dismissed these thoughts and turned to Jiang Tian, ​​asking, "Officer Jiang, I know you've done some things, but I'm curious, you clearly have a bright future. You don't need to do anything now; you could easily rise through the ranks simply by following the established path. Why did you choose to venture into this den of tigers alone? Do you know that with just one order from me, dozens of gunmen would surround you and leave you without a burial place? All your grand ambitions would vanish."

Jiang Tian almost laughed upon hearing this.

Not because of the question itself.

But because Jiang Tian immediately saw the deeper meaning behind Chen Qiang's question—a test, a probe to see if there was still a chance. If Jiang Tian's answer revealed that he was truly alone, without any police support, Chen Qiang might have considered risking his life.

However, Jiang Tian's single sentence

instantly robbed Chen Qiang of all his courage.

"So, do you know how I got my Special Merit Citation?" Jiang Tian tapped the table.

Jiang Tian had carried out so many missions, so why was it that he only broke through the limitations of the First-Class Merit Citation once and was awarded the Special Merit Citation?

"How did you get it?" Chen Qiang was also very curious.



Chapter 604 The Calm Before the Storm, the Situation About to Erupt


In fact, information about Jiang Tian's many first-class merits was readily available, but his special-class merit was something many people were inquiring about. However, what many found unbelievable was the complete lack of information; the cover-up was too tight, with not a single leak.

Or rather...

this special-class merit held a deeper meaning.

But now, Jiang Tian could clearly tell Chen Qiang: "Let me tell you why I'm here, and why I mentioned the special-class merit. Because of Tucha in Myanmar, you know? Back then, I went to Myanmar alone to rescue an undercover agent. Alone, surrounded by hundreds, even thousands, of armed drug traffickers, I single-handedly killed hundreds of them and broke through the encirclement, and both I and the prisoner were unharmed."

Jiang Tian didn't explain why he dared to venture here alone.

But his simple words

completely and bluntly told Chen Qiang why he was here, and why he came alone.

Whether there were people or forces surrounding him, whether there were prior arrangements.

None of that mattered, because Jiang Tian's confidence stemmed from his ability to clearly tell Chen Qiang, "I alone am enough."

"No matter how strong you are, there's still Yunhai's Tucha, with their powerful local forces, armed forces, and dozens of gunmen? It's a joke."

"Many of the first-class merit recipients have killed far more people than these hundred or so armed lackeys."

"Even the carefully cultivated elites are like this.

What about Yunhai's side, a bunch of rabble lacking real combat experience?"

"You have to understand, the local warlords in Myanmar fight amongst themselves every day; how could Yunhai's pampered lackeys compare?"

"I see."

Chen Qiang's head buzzed.

"No wonder.

No wonder I couldn't get any information.

Because if this news got out, it would cause a terrifying uproar."

"

One man, surrounded by hundreds or even thousands of armed men, and accompanied by an undercover agent with a dependent child.

Not only did he annihilate a terrifying and powerful force a thousand miles away, but even more terrifyingly, both of them returned unharmed.

That's the most outrageous and terrifying part.

"Wait, how did you do that?" Chen Qiang gasped, his eyes wide.

Jiang Tian shrugged.

Actually, at that time, for Jiang Tian, ​​it was a choice born of desperation.

In fact, that case was the battle that best showcased Jiang Tian's combat prowess, and could be considered a highly representative achievement.

If it were publicized,

it would be absolutely brilliant.

But unfortunately,

he never reported it; he essentially smuggled himself in.

And after arriving, he didn't abide by the local laws, so the authorities were in the right.

When they condemned him, he had no grounds for complaint.

Therefore, this kind of thing had to be kept secret as much as possible.

Otherwise, if you went to someone else's territory and killed so many of their people,

you wouldn't have any grounds to complain if you were actually wanted.

Of course, taking him down was impossible, absolutely impossible, because back then, very few people knew that Jiang Tian's fighting strength wasn't very high.

Compared to Jiang Tian of that time, the current Jiang Tian is on a completely different level.

"Now, what's your choice?" Jiang Tian was losing patience.

He was only saying this much to consider Chen Liting's feelings.

Otherwise, things had come to this point; if he arrested him immediately, Chen Qiang wouldn't have a chance to resist. If he really resisted, at worst, the Huayu Building would be stained red with blood, and Jiang Tian would inevitably have to donate blood everywhere, but then things would be difficult to handle.

Jiang Tian hoped to smoothly transition things to Chen Liting.

As for Chen Qiang himself, he would be in detention.

He would help Chen Liting resolve any problems she couldn't solve while in detention.

Or rather, prison.

"Liting, come here." Chen Qiang looked at his daughter.

This was the first time Chen Qiang had looked at his daughter since entering the house. As Chen Liting approached, Chen Qiang realized that his daughter was already far taller than him.

Chen Qiang was incredibly burly, with a commanding presence and taut muscles all over his body.

However, he was only 1.7 meters tall.

Chen Liting, already taller than Chen Qiang, was wearing platform shoes, making her appear more than half a head taller than her father.

They've grown up. The children have all grown up.

"Dad," Chen Liting said, bowing her head to Chen Xu.

At this moment, Chen Liting didn't know how to face her father.

Unlike Chen Xu, whose father-son relationship was fraught with conflict, Chen Liting outwardly disapproved of her father, but deep down, she wanted to help him.

However, Chen Liting knew that her father was on the wrong path.

But wrong is wrong.

Chen Liting understood there was no turning back. She could only try to lessen her father's sins, hoping one day he would stop.

She also understood that anyone who walks by the river will eventually get wet, especially in this day and age.

On this path,

one day, she would inevitably fall in.

As long as one continues to walk on the narrow bridge of crime, there will always be a slippery day. Therefore, Chen Liting realized one thing from a very young age:

that is, to join the greatest force.

to become part of the state apparatus.

Since her father would eventually come to justice, the intelligent girl understood that since arresting him was the same as arresting him, she might as well do the arrest herself.

“Do you blame me?” Chen Liting clenched her fists.

“No, I don’t blame you.” Chen Qiang unexpectedly shook his head.

In truth, Chen Qiang understood his daughter’s thoughts perfectly well, but sometimes, some things, Chen Qiang couldn’t simply stop himself from doing them.

"Liting, you've succeeded now."

"In the future, this Huayu Group will be yours."

"I hope you can carry on the Huayu Group and make it great, but at the same time, you must strictly report every detail to the organization. Do you understand?"

Chen Qiang reassured Chen Liting.

At this moment, Chen Qiang was still able to calmly comfort his daughter.

To be honest,

even Jiang Tian, ​​who was standing to the side, was somewhat moved.

He truly deserves to be called a ruthless hero.

Jiang Tian felt a surge of admiration for that kind of mental fortitude.

That's quite rare.

“Dad, I understand.” Chen Liting’s eyes blurred with tears.

Chen Qiang took a deep breath, calming his agitated heart.

He then took out the landline phone.

With a blank expression, he said, “Summon all shareholders to my office for a meeting. I have something important to say. Tell everyone, no matter who they are or what they are doing, if they don’t come, they never need to come again.”

A calm, like the calm before a storm.

The situation was about to escalate.



Chapter 605 Which bastard got the billions in assets?


Within half an hour of Chen Qiang hanging up the phone, the entire conference room was packed.

Or rather...

Back when Chen Qiang was building his empire, he had amassed a considerable group of henchmen and followers. These men rose in rank and status alongside him.

Of course, under normal circumstances, these brothers would have lived a life of luxury, and that was indeed the case.

For example, Lao Guai.

He specialized in handling Chen Qiang's shady dealings.

Most of these old brothers had retired from the criminal world, but some still wielded considerable influence within the group.

Therefore,

Chen Liting's desire to inherit the position and ensure a smooth transition of power was not something Chen Qiang could easily accomplish. Moreover, over the years, the internal structure of the Huayu Group had become extremely complex.

This wasn't just true for the Huayu Group; the Wenye Group was similarly complex.

To this day, the municipal and provincial bureaus are still conducting in-depth investigations and screenings of the Wenye Group, striving to leave no bad apples unpunished.

"Why is Brother Qiang calling us in the middle of the night?"

The speaker was Zeng Wei.

Back when Chen Qiang was involved in organized crime, Zeng Wei was already a significant leader. Chen Qiang's rise to power was largely due to Zeng Wei's connections. Zeng Wei wielded considerable influence within the Huayu Group, second only to Chen Qiang in importance.

Those in the meeting room, upon hearing Zeng Wei's words, exchanged bewildered whispers, completely baffled by the question.

"To be honest, it seems like nothing much has happened in Yunhai lately except for that 'killer star' Jiang Tian getting unlucky and being targeted."

"That's right. The key is, we didn't get involved in that incident. Did you guys get involved?"

"How could we get involved? Brother Qiang specifically instructed us that we absolutely shouldn't provoke that 'killer star' unless absolutely necessary. That 'killer star' is a cancer; anyone who crosses him is doomed. We can't afford to be so foolish."

"Yeah, Wenye Group is such a big company, and that guy wiped it all out in one go. Is that something a human could do? I pulled some strings, I heard connections in the city and even the province were useless. With one word from that 'killer star,' who dares to say a word against it?"

The meeting room was filled with murmurs.

Mainly because a lot of major events had happened recently, but the most serious and latest one was that Officer Jiang from the Municipal Public Security Bureau had been posted online and was suffering severe cyberbullying.

These people even secretly gloated, watching the spectacle unfold. Mainly, they were happy to see who provoked the killer, or for the killer to suffer the consequences.

After all, chaos reigns, and only chaos creates waves. They deeply understood the saying, "The bigger the wave, the more valuable the fish."

That's been happening lately.

Good heavens.

The terrifying speed at which they were making money, with their companies selling heroin, gave them an unparalleled advantage. This rate of profit far surpassed even the printing press.

How could he not be excited?

But as time passed, the conversation in the conference room grew louder and noisier.

No one caused trouble at this time.

What a joke.

Trouble? Shouldn't they ask what Chen Qiang did back in the day?

Actually, there were more than thirty old comrades present, all of whom had fought alongside Chen Qiang to build the empire.

These old comrades were actually quite formidable within the group, because their entrenched positions were difficult for him to shake.

Over the years,

these old comrades had shed sweat and blood, so in many ways, they had been given leeway, enjoying the good life together.

But now, that was no longer possible.

During the power transition.

Chen Qiang clearly understood.

At this moment, outside the conference room, behind a screen—actually a one-way mirror—one could see the entire conference room and the discussions from inside, but those inside could only see the monitor screen.

"Although I have a lot of say in front of these old brothers, and they have all made money from the group's development, so they haven't refuted me, they will be huge obstacles when it comes to the transfer of power," Chen Qiang sighed softly.

Actually,

he desperately wanted to clean up his act.

Having already committed so many capital crimes, coveting ill-gotten gains would only increase his own danger.

With so much money, what did he need more for? Chen Qiang didn't actually want to do those illegal things.

But many things were beyond his control. His old buddies were like that; they insisted on doing it, and even Chen Qiang couldn't stop them.

Having witnessed the terrifying profits, these people had gone mad.

"I understand. Huayu Group already has a lot of wealth. I've always struggled to understand why you still sell heroin, but now I understand."

Jiang Tian nodded slightly.

This is because the ship is too big to turn around easily, and these old buddies are the biggest obstacle.

"Besides, if you want Liting to take over Huayu Group, these people will definitely cause trouble. Take Zeng Wei, for example, the group's number two. He was like an older brother to me back then, and was once considered the leader. While I'm here, it's manageable, but you should understand, Liting can't possibly control him. There will definitely be chaos. And it's not just Zeng Wei; all those people are like that. Who wouldn't want such a large group?"

Chen Qiang understood perfectly well.

Moreover, Chen Qiang had been troubled by this matter for a long time. His past misplaced compassion had left behind such a huge problem.

It was because he had been making money smoothly all along, distributing it fairly, and even taking some losses himself without mistreating his brothers, that everything had gone smoothly.

But once their interests are threatened, see if these people still recognize their leader.

Times have changed, and these people have changed too. They are no longer the brothers who fought alongside him. Over the years, their eyes have been corrupted by self-interest.

The initial sense of honor and loyalty was gone.

Chen Qiang had previously considered ways to eliminate these people, but now, he had effectively used Jiang Tian and his group to get rid of these old brothers.

He had smoothly regained control of the business empire within the Chen family.

However, his daughter would eventually marry.

He wondered which scoundrel would ultimately benefit from this multi-billion dollar conglomerate.

Thinking of this, Chen Qiang gritted his teeth in hatred.



Chapter 606 Every country has its laws, and every family has its rules.


But, giving it to his daughter, it's better to have it all confiscated.

The Chen family still belongs to this social class.

All those years of hard work hadn't been in vain; in this way, he could consider it a completion of his mission.

Thinking this, Chen Qiang gradually calmed down.

"Dad," Chen Liting looked at her father, overwhelmed with emotion.

This was, after all, her own father!

Moreover.

From the very beginning, besides her sense of justice, Chen Liting truly understood that Huayu Group was beyond redemption.

She understood even more clearly that if things continued down this path of crime, there was no turning back; one day, they would all be trapped.

Even without her.

Perhaps, Huayu Group would only be in a worse state now.

"Comrade Liting, don't worry. You've infiltrated Huayu Group and rendered meritorious service to the organization. The organization won't treat you unfairly. Regarding your father's case, his cooperation was one aspect, but you yourself have also rendered meritorious service to the organization. The higher-ups will consider this, and considering the possibility of your father turning himself in, a life sentence, or even a fixed-term imprisonment, is possible. He'll be out in ten years." Jiang Tian smiled.

Some connections, if used, might allow him to get out in ten years.

However, these things were no longer relevant to Jiang Tian.

His mission was singular: to uncover and solve all illegal and criminal activities.

"Thank you, senior." Chen Liting's heart pounded like a deer.

She glanced at Jiang Tian, ​​then hurriedly lowered her head, unsure what to do with her hands.

Fortunately, Chen Qiang's eyes were fixed on the conference room and he hadn't noticed his daughter's behavior; otherwise, he would have definitely sensed something was wrong.

"Officer Jiang, I can't handle these old brothers myself, so I'll leave them all to you. Once you've dealt with them, I'll transfer all the group's shares to Liting. With my trusted men—all clean, professional agents—she can easily take over the business. As for your motives, don't worry. These people are gone. But if you want to continue delving into the shady business, you also have trusted men who will cooperate." Chen Qiang's once jet-black hair had turned mostly gray in a short time, making him seem much older overnight.

For Chen Qiang, a man who upheld honor his entire life, this betrayal of his brothers was a cruel blow.

And he was even arrested by his own daughter.

Perhaps this is karma, that even heaven couldn't bear to see him suffer, and thus this was his final fate.

"Leave the rest to me." Jiang Tian nodded, then took out a walkie-talkie from his pocket and said, "All units, attention! Target: the office on the east side of the 29th floor. There are approximately thirty people in total. Be prepared to move in at any time to prevent any from escaping."

"First Squad, robbed."

"Roger."

"Roger..."

The continuous chatter came through the walkie-talkie.

When the noise finally subsided, Chen Qiang's lips twitched.

He knew it, and Chen Qiang even felt a sliver of hope.

Fortunately, Jiang Tian didn't try to escape by helicopter or do anything foolish after appearing. Otherwise, he might have been shot down at the last moment, his body never to be found.

Of course.

Thinking back, Chen Qiang looked at Jiang Tian with a twitching smile and said, "I knew Officer Jiang was a master strategist. How could he possibly have ventured into a den of wolves alone? He was prepared all along."

As for what Jiang Tian said earlier—that he went into Myanmar alone, fought his way in and out seven times, even carrying an undercover agent, and finally killed hundreds of people and escaped unscathed—such a mythical story couldn't possibly exist.

"Dad, don't say anymore, it's true. Our police academy teachers have already told us," Chen Liting said hastily, her face flushed.

This matter...

Actually, the authorities can't say it directly, but it can circulate. There's no need to keep it completely secret. A little bit leaked out is fine. As long as the authorities don't confirm or say anything, no one can say what the final truth is. What if it's just rumors spread by others?

Other countries, even less so, can make judgments based on mere rumors.

However, this didn't stop many teachers at the police academy, after hearing some whispers from higher-ups, from wildly speculating and exaggerating the situation surrounding Jiang Tian, ​​an event lacking both confirmation and official authority.

Buzz!!!

Chen Qiang looked at his daughter, utterly bewildered, then glanced at Jiang Tian beside him. Jiang Tian was stroking his chin, starkly contrasting the anxious expressions on the faces of those people through the one-way mirror with Jiang Tian's pensive expression.

"Officer Jiang, how do you plan to deal with them?" Chen Qiang asked worriedly. After all, these were brothers he'd fought alongside in the past. Even if they didn't end well, Chen Qiang hoped their crimes would be lenient, at least that they would be dealt with with leniency.

"A country has its laws, a family has its rules. We'll handle things the way they should. This isn't my personal fiefdom, nor is it a matter of 'whatever I say goes.' Of course, if someone performs meritorious service here, they'll be highly praised, and the sentence will be lenient." Jiang Tian finished speaking and pushed open the door.

At this moment.

Inside the conference room, there was a flurry of discussion.

Even Zeng Wei was getting restless.

In fact.

Chen Qiang, through the one-way glass, could only see and hear what they were saying and talking.

It was mainly for Chen Qiang to understand and analyze before the meeting and how to speak during it.

But Jiang Tian was different.

With his expertise in criminal investigation, Jiang Tian could see everything at a glance. He could discern everyone's attitudes and even the subtlest expressions that ordinary people couldn't see, including a slight frown. Jiang Tian could analyze many of their psychological attitudes and thoughts.

In that short time, Jiang Tian had actually accurately identified the personalities and strengths of all thirty-odd people present.

For example, some were extremely assertive and needed to be apprehended and dealt with.

However, based on Jiang Tian's observation, there were also a few who, could stay and help Han Liting stabilize the situation.

Therefore, even if arrests are necessary, it's not essential to apprehend everyone. Leaving a few behind will make it easier for Chen Liting to handle the situation.

These are things that Jiang Tian discovered in just a few minutes, things that Chen Qiang, who has worked with him day and night for so many years, might not understand as well as Jiang Tian does.

Because there are people here who appear weak, honest, and simple on the outside, but in Jiang Tian's eyes, are the most ruthless, bar none, and are very deeply hidden.

What, you ask how you discovered it?

Excuse me, Jiang Tian looked at the scanning radar and saw about four or five very faint points of light.

Click!!!

The moment the conference room door was kicked open...



Chapter 607 Taking advantage of one's age is utterly absurd.


The already impatient people in the conference room instantly focused their attention on the doorway.

At that moment.

Right there stood a young man and a young woman. The young woman was Chen Liting, whom everyone present recognized.

After all, Chen Liting had grown up with Chen Qiang, so they often saw her at his house. However, this girl had never seemed to like them and rarely paid them any attention.

Let alone come to the company. In fact, to their recollection, this was Chen Liting's first time at the company.

This surprised them greatly.

From what they knew, Chen Liting didn't have a good impression of the company, Chen Qiang, or even themselves; in fact, she was somewhat hostile. They'd heard that shortly after starting junior high, Chen Liting started earning her own money and refused to use Chen Qiang's.

Seeing Chen Liting here was extremely surprising to those who knew her.

Another point is...

The young man standing in front of Chen Liting had no expression on his face, only a casual glance sweeping over everyone in the conference room. Regardless, these people were all people who had fought alongside Chen Qiang since his humble beginnings.

Therefore, from Jiang Tian's perspective,

these people all possessed terrifying levels of guilt.

Some of them even had guilt levels approaching Chen Qiang's.

Of course,

it wasn't that everyone was guilty. Jiang Tian noticed four people among the thirty-odd individuals—yes, four or five people—who surprisingly had very low guilt levels, proving they were relatively clean.

On the other hand, they probably had long since retired from crime, content to enjoy their dividends without continuing illegal activities.

And this choice was definitely a smart one.

Honestly enjoying their dividends, doing nothing, they already had more money than they could spend; why pursue things that risked their lives?

Wouldn't it be better to enjoy a peaceful and quiet retirement?

That's better than anything else!

"Liting, you're here."
